{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/index.html\n+<!doctype html>\n+<html lang=\"de\">\n+<head>\n+  <meta charset=\"utf-8\">\n+  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\">\n+  <title>Besondere Bagger</title>\n+  <meta name=\"description\" content=\"Interaktive Bagger, die keine 0815-Bagger sind.\">\n+  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"styles.css\">\n+</head>\n+<body>\n+  <main class=\"shell\">\n+    <section class=\"hero\" aria-labelledby=\"title\">\n+      <div>\n+        <p class=\"eyebrow\">Gulasch Heavy Hearts</p>\n+        <h1 id=\"title\">Bagger, die zurueckfuehlen.</h1>\n+        <p class=\"intro\">Waehle einen besonderen Bagger, sprich mit ihm, pflege ihn und baue Vertrauen auf. Jeder hat eine eigene Seele aus Stahl, Hydraulik und Sehnsucht.</p>\n+      </div>\n+      <div class=\"bond-card\" aria-live=\"polite\">\n+        <span>Bindung</span>\n+        <strong id=\"bond-value\">0%</strong>\n+        <div class=\"meter\"><i id=\"bond-meter\"></i></div>\n+        <p id=\"bond-title\">Noch fremde Maschinenherzen</p>\n+      </div>\n+    </section>\n+\n+    <section class=\"garage\" aria-label=\"Bagger Auswahl\">\n+      <button class=\"excavator-card active\" data-id=\"aurora\">\n+        <span class=\"badge\">Mondketten</span>\n+        <strong>Aurora 7000</strong>\n+        <small>Traeumt davon, nachts Krater fuer Sterne zu graben.</small>\n+      </button>\n+      <button class=\"excavator-card\" data-id=\"brummbert\">\n+        <span class=\"badge\">Sanfter Riese</span>\n+        <strong>Brummbert</strong>\n+        <small>Kann Beton brechen, aber wird weich bei Komplimenten.</small>\n+      </button>\n+      <button class=\"excavator-card\" data-id=\"mira\">\n+        <span class=\"badge\">Tiefenpoetin</span>\n+        <strong>Mira Schaufelstern</strong>\n+        <small>Schreibt Haikus in Erdschichten und sammelt Kiesel.</small>\n+      </button>\n+    </section>\n+\n+    <section class=\"stage\" aria-label=\"Interaktion mit dem Bagger\">\n+      <div class=\"machine-wrap\">\n+        <div id=\"machine\" class=\"machine aurora\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Ein besonderer animierter Bagger\">\n+          <div class=\"boom\"></div>\n+          <div class=\"arm\"></div>\n+          <div class=\"bucket\"></div>\n+          <div class=\"cab\"><span></span></div>\n+          <div class=\"body\"></div>\n+          <div class=\"tracks\"></div>\n+          <div class=\"heart\">\u2665</div>\n+        </div>\n+        <div class=\"ground\"></div>\n+      </div>\n+\n+      <article class=\"profile\">\n+        <p class=\"label\">Du verbringst Zeit mit</p>\n+        <h2 id=\"bagger-name\">Aurora 7000</h2>\n+        <p id=\"bagger-story\">Aurora wurde in einer stillgelegten Sternwarte gebaut. Ihr Ausleger ist so fein kalibriert, dass sie Mondlicht aus Pfuetzen heben kann.</p>\n+        <div class=\"mood\">\n+          <span>Stimmung</span>\n+          <strong id=\"mood\">Vorsichtig neugierig</strong>\n+        </div>\n+        <div id=\"message\" class=\"message\">Aurora senkt leise die Schaufel. Sie wartet, ob du sie wirklich siehst.</div>\n+        <div class=\"actions\" aria-label=\"Bagger Aktionen\">\n+          <button data-action=\"talk\">Mit ihm reden</button>\n+          <button data-action=\"polish\">Schaufel polieren</button>\n+          <button data-action=\"dig\">Gemeinsam graben</button>\n+          <button data-action=\"gift\">Kiesel schenken</button>\n+        </div>\n+      </article>\n+    </section>\n+\n+    <section class=\"memory\" aria-labelledby=\"memory-title\">\n+      <h2 id=\"memory-title\">Gemeinsame Erinnerungen</h2>\n+      <ul id=\"memories\">\n+        <li>Noch ist das Fahrtenbuch leer. Der erste Moment zaehlt.</li>\n+      </ul>\n+    </section>\n+  </main>\n+  <script src=\"script.js\"></script>\n+</body>\n+</html>\n*** Add File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/styles.css\n+:root {\n+  color-scheme: dark;\n+  --bg: #11100d;\n+  --panel: #1e1a15;\n+  --panel-2: #292217;\n+  --text: #fff4dd;\n+  --muted: #c9b891;\n+  --gold: #ffbc42;\n+  --amber: #e97824;\n+  --pink: #ff6b8b;\n+  --shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, .35);\n+}\n+\n+* { box-sizing: border-box; }\n+\n+body {\n+  margin: 0;\n+  min-height: 100vh;\n+  font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", sans-serif;\n+  background:\n+    radial-gradient(circle at 16% 8%, rgba(255, 188, 66, .18), transparent 28rem),\n+    radial-gradient(circle at 90% 18%, rgba(255, 107, 139, .14), transparent 25rem),\n+    linear-gradient(135deg, #11100d 0%, #1b1712 52%, #090807 100%);\n+  color: var(--text);\n+}\n+\n+button { font: inherit; }\n+\n+.shell {\n+  width: min(1180px, calc(100% - 32px));\n+  margin: 0 auto;\n+  padding: 42px 0;\n+}\n+\n+.hero, .stage, .memory {\n+  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 244, 221, .12);\n+  background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(30, 26, 21, .92), rgba(22, 19, 15, .84));\n+  border-radius: 32px;\n+  box-shadow: 0 24px 80px var(--shadow);\n+}\n+\n+.hero {\n+  display: grid;\n+  grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px;\n+  gap: 24px;\n+  align-items: end;\n+  padding: clamp(28px, 6vw, 68px);\n+}\n+\n+.eyebrow, .label {\n+  margin: 0 0 10px;\n+  color: var(--gold);\n+  font-size: .78rem;\n+  font-weight: 800;\n+  letter-spacing: .16em;\n+  text-transform: uppercase;\n+}\n+\n+h1, h2, p { margin-top: 0; }\n+\n+h1 {\n+  max-width: 760px;\n+  margin-bottom: 18px;\n+  font-size: clamp(3rem, 9vw, 7.8rem);\n+  line-height: .82;\n+  letter-spacing: -.075em;\n+}\n+\n+.intro {\n+  max-width: 650px;\n+  margin-bottom: 0;\n+  color: var(--muted);\n+  font-size: clamp(1.04rem, 2vw, 1.28rem);\n+  line-height: 1.6;\n+}\n+\n+.bond-card {\n+  padding: 24px;\n+  border-radius: 24px;\n+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .065);\n+}\n+\n+.bond-card span, .mood span {\n+  display: block;\n+  color: var(--muted);\n+  font-size: .9rem;\n+}\n+\n+.bond-card strong {\n+  display: block;\n+  margin: 8px 0 14px;\n+  font-size: 3rem;\n+}\n+\n+.bond-card p { margin-bottom: 0; color: var(--muted); }\n+\n+.meter {\n+  height: 12px;\n+  overflow: hidden;\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .11);\n+}\n+\n+.meter i {\n+  display: block;\n+  width: 0%;\n+  height: 100%;\n+  border-radius: inherit;\n+  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--amber), var(--gold), var(--pink));\n+  transition: width .45s ease;\n+}\n+\n+.garage {\n+  display: grid;\n+  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);\n+  gap: 16px;\n+  margin: 18px 0;\n+}\n+\n+.excavator-card {\n+  min-height: 160px;\n+  padding: 22px;\n+  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 244, 221, .12);\n+  border-radius: 24px;\n+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .055);\n+  color: var(--text);\n+  text-align: left;\n+  cursor: pointer;\n+  transition: transform .2s ease, border-color .2s ease, background .2s ease;\n+}\n+\n+.excavator-card:hover, .excavator-card.active {\n+  transform: translateY(-4px);\n+  border-color: rgba(255, 188, 66, .65);\n+  background: rgba(255, 188, 66, .11);\n+}\n+\n+.badge {\n+  display: inline-block;\n+  margin-bottom: 28px;\n+  padding: 6px 10px;\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  background: rgba(255, 188, 66, .15);\n+  color: var(--gold);\n+  font-size: .78rem;\n+  font-weight: 800;\n+}\n+\n+.excavator-card strong { display: block; font-size: 1.5rem; }\n+.excavator-card small { display: block; margin-top: 8px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.45; }\n+\n+.stage {\n+  display: grid;\n+  grid-template-columns: minmax(320px, 1.05fr) minmax(320px, .95fr);\n+  gap: 34px;\n+  align-items: center;\n+  padding: clamp(24px, 5vw, 52px);\n+}\n+\n+.machine-wrap {\n+  position: relative;\n+  min-height: 420px;\n+  display: grid;\n+  place-items: center;\n+}\n+\n+.ground {\n+  position: absolute;\n+  left: 4%;\n+  right: 4%;\n+  bottom: 64px;\n+  height: 20px;\n+  border-radius: 999px;\n+  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5a3d20, #d08a33, #5a3d20);\n+  filter: blur(.3px);\n+}\n+\n+.machine {\n+  position: relative;\n+  width: min(500px, 86vw);\n+  height: 300px;\n+  transform-origin: 50% 80%;\n+  animation: idle 4s ease-in-out infinite;\n+  z-index: 1;\n+}\n+\n+.body, .cab, .tracks, .boom, .arm, .bucket { position: absolute; }\n+.body { left: 130px; top: 142px; width: 190px; height: 82px; border-radius: 24px 36px 18px 18px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--amber)); }\n+.cab { left: 180px; top: 82px; width: 96px; height: 82px; border-radius: 26px 26px 12px 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffd985, #f28f2d); }\n+.cab span { position: absolute; inset: 16px 18px 26px; border-radius: 16px 16px 8px 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1b4152, #79d8ff); }\n+.tracks { left: 96px; top: 218px; width: 260px; height: 54px; border-radius: 999px; background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #201b15 0 22px, #3a3023 22px 34px); border: 8px solid #12100d; }\n+.boom { left: 254px; top: 74px; width: 205px; height: 24px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--gold); transform: rotate(24deg); transform-origin: 0 50%; }\n+.arm { left: 420px; top: 145px; width: 112px; height: 22px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--amber); transform: rotate(72deg); transform-origin: 0 50%; }\n+.bucket { left: 458px; top: 244px; width: 64px; height: 50px; border-radius: 8px 8px 30px 30px; background: #6d5640; transform: rotate(-12deg); }\n+.heart { position: absolute; left: 214px; top: 116px; color: #941f35; font-size: 24px; text-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(255, 107, 139, .9); opacity: .9; }\n+\n+.machine.happy .heart { animation: pulse .7s ease-in-out 3; }\n+.machine.digging .boom { animation: boomDig .9s ease-in-out 2; }\n+.machine.digging .arm { animation: armDig .9s ease-in-out 2; }\n+.machine.digging .bucket { animation: bucketDig .9s ease-in-out 2; }\n+\n+.machine.brummbert { --gold: #f36d3d; --amber: #9f4a25; }\n+.machine.mira { --gold: #b77cff; --amber: #5e75ff; }\n+\n+.profile h2 { margin-bottom: 14px; font-size: clamp(2.1rem, 4vw, 4.2rem); line-height: .95; }\n+.profile p, .message { color: var(--muted); font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.65; }\n+.mood { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 18px; margin: 24px 0; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 18px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .07); }\n+.mood strong { color: var(--gold); text-align: right; }\n+.message { min-height: 104px; padding: 20px; border-left: 4px solid var(--gold); border-radius: 18px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .18); }\n+\n+.actions { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin-top: 18px; }\n+.actions button {\n+  min-height: 58px;\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-radius: 16px;\n+  background: var(--gold);\n+  color: #1a1208;\n+  font-weight: 900;\n+  cursor: pointer;\n+  box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, .22);\n+}\n+.actions button:hover { filter: brightness(1.07); transform: translateY(-1px); }\n+\n+.memory { margin-top: 18px; padding: 28px; }\n+.memory h2 { margin-bottom: 16px; }\n+.memory ul { display: grid; gap: 10px; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; }\n+.memory li { padding: 14px 16px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .065); color: var(--muted); }\n+\n+@keyframes idle { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(-.4deg); } 50% { transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(.5deg); } }\n+@keyframes pulse { 50% { transform: scale(1.45); color: #ff6b8b; } }\n+@keyframes boomDig { 50% { transform: rotate(12deg); } }\n+@keyframes armDig { 50% { transform: rotate(92deg); } }\n+@keyframes bucketDig { 50% { transform: rotate(18deg) translateY(12px); } }\n+\n+@media (max-width: 820px) {\n+  .shell { width: min(100% - 20px, 680px); padding: 16px 0; }\n+  .hero, .stage { grid-template-columns: 1fr; border-radius: 24px; }\n+  .garage { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n+  .machine-wrap { min-height: 330px; overflow: hidden; }\n+  .machine { transform: scale(.74); }\n+  .actions { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n+}\n*** Add File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/script.js\n+const baggers = {\n+  aurora: {\n+    name: 'Aurora 7000',\n+    story: 'Aurora wurde in einer stillgelegten Sternwarte gebaut. Ihr Ausleger ist so fein kalibriert, dass sie Mondlicht aus Pfuetzen heben kann.',\n+    mood: 'Vorsichtig neugierig',\n+    messages: {\n+      talk: 'Aurora blinkt zweimal mit der Kabinenlampe: \"Ich mag Menschen, die leise ankommen. Erzaehl mir von dem schoensten Loch, das du je gesehen hast.\"',\n+      polish: 'Die Schaufel spiegelt kurz den Himmel. Aurora richtet sich stolz auf und schnurrt hydraulisch.',\n+      dig: 'Ihr grabt zusammen eine winzige Sternmulde. Fuer einen Moment riecht die Erde nach Nacht und Versprechen.',\n+      gift: 'Aurora legt den Kiesel vorsichtig in ihr Handschuhfach. Er wird ab jetzt ihr Navigationsstein.'\n+    }\n+  },\n+  brummbert: {\n+    name: 'Brummbert',\n+    story: 'Brummbert war einmal Tunnelretter in den Alpen. Er merkt sich jede Stimme, die ihm vertraut hat, und brummt Namen im Leerlauf.',\n+    mood: 'Tapfer, aber verkuschelt',\n+    messages: {\n+      talk: 'Brummbert antwortet mit einem tiefen, warmen Rumpeln. Das ist Baggerisch fuer: \"Bleib noch ein bisschen.\"',\n+      polish: 'Unter dem Staub kommt eine alte Rettungsplakette hervor. Brummbert wird ganz still vor Freude.',\n+      dig: 'Brummbert hebt eine perfekte Rampe aus der Erde. Nicht weil es noetig war, sondern weil er dir imponieren wollte.',\n+      gift: 'Er nimmt den Kiesel wie einen Orden entgegen. Seine Ketten stehen heute einen Zentimeter gerader.'\n+    }\n+  },\n+  mira: {\n+    name: 'Mira Schaufelstern',\n+    story: 'Mira kartiert unterirdische Fluesse und schreibt Gedichte in Lehm. Ihre Lieblingsfarbe ist frisch freigelegte Tiefe.',\n+    mood: 'Traeumerisch fokussiert',\n+    messages: {\n+      talk: 'Mira kratzt drei Linien in den Boden: \"Erde erinnert sich. Danke, dass du fragst.\"',\n+      polish: 'Auf ihrer Schaufel erscheint ein Muster wie eine kleine Galaxie aus Sandkoernern.',\n+      dig: 'Mira findet einen kuehlen Stein und laesst ihn in deine Richtung rollen. Ein Geschenk, aber schuechtern.',\n+      gift: 'Sie sortiert den Kiesel nach Klang, Gewicht und emotionaler Aufrichtigkeit. Er besteht.'\n+    }\n+  }\n+};\n+\n+const state = {\n+  current: 'aurora',\n+  bond: Number(localStorage.getItem('baggerBond') || 0),\n+  memories: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('baggerMemories') || '[]')\n+};\n+\n+const machine = document.querySelector('#machine');\n+const nameEl = document.querySelector('#bagger-name');\n+const storyEl = document.querySelector('#bagger-story');\n+const moodEl = document.querySelector('#mood');\n+const messageEl = document.querySelector('#message');\n+const bondValue = document.querySelector('#bond-value');\n+const bondMeter = document.querySelector('#bond-meter');\n+const bondTitle = document.querySelector('#bond-title');\n+const memoriesEl = document.querySelector('#memories');\n+\n+function render() {\n+  const bagger = baggers[state.current];\n+  nameEl.textContent = bagger.name;\n+  storyEl.textContent = bagger.story;\n+  moodEl.textContent = state.bond > 70 ? 'Vertraut dir mit offenem Hydraulikherz' : bagger.mood;\n+  bondValue.textContent = `${state.bond}%`;\n+  bondMeter.style.width = `${state.bond}%`;\n+  bondTitle.textContent = getBondTitle();\n+  machine.className = `machine ${state.current}`;\n+\n+  document.querySelectorAll('.excavator-card').forEach((card) => {\n+    card.classList.toggle('active', card.dataset.id === state.current);\n+  });\n+\n+  memoriesEl.innerHTML = '';\n+  const memories = state.memories.length ? state.memories.slice(0, 6) : ['Noch ist das Fahrtenbuch leer. Der erste Moment zaehlt.'];\n+  memories.forEach((memory) => {\n+    const li = document.createElement('li');\n+    li.textContent = memory;\n+    memoriesEl.appendChild(li);\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+function getBondTitle() {\n+  if (state.bond >= 90) return 'Seelenverwandte aus Stahl und Erde';\n+  if (state.bond >= 65) return 'Tiefe Baggerfreundschaft';\n+  if (state.bond >= 35) return 'Wachsende Hydrauliknaehe';\n+  if (state.bond > 0) return 'Erste warme Motorgeraesche';\n+  return 'Noch fremde Maschinenherzen';\n+}\n+\n+function remember(text) {\n+  state.memories.unshift(text);\n+  state.memories = state.memories.slice(0, 12);\n+  localStorage.setItem('baggerMemories', JSON.stringify(state.memories));\n+}\n+\n+function interact(action) {\n+  const bagger = baggers[state.current];\n+  const gain = { talk: 7, polish: 9, dig: 12, gift: 10 }[action];\n+  state.bond = Math.min(100, state.bond + gain);\n+  localStorage.setItem('baggerBond', String(state.bond));\n+  messageEl.textContent = bagger.messages[action];\n+  remember(`${bagger.name}: ${shortAction(action)} (+${gain}% Bindung)`);\n+\n+  machine.classList.add(action === 'dig' ? 'digging' : 'happy');\n+  window.setTimeout(() => machine.classList.remove('happy', 'digging'), 1600);\n+  render();\n+}\n+\n+function shortAction(action) {\n+  return {\n+    talk: 'Ihr habt ein ehrliches Baggergespraech gefuehrt',\n+    polish: 'Du hast seine Schaufel zum Glaenzen gebracht',\n+    dig: 'Ihr habt gemeinsam Erde bewegt',\n+    gift: 'Du hast einen bedeutungsvollen Kiesel geschenkt'\n+  }[action];\n+}\n+\n+document.querySelectorAll('.excavator-card').forEach((card) => {\n+  card.addEventListener('click', () => {\n+    state.current = card.dataset.id;\n+    messageEl.textContent = `${baggers[state.current].name} schaut dich erwartungsvoll an.`;\n+    render();\n+  });\n+});\n+\n+document.querySelectorAll('[data-action]').forEach((button) => {\n+  button.addEventListener('click', () => interact(button.dataset.action));\n+});\n+\n+render();\n*** End Patch"
}

▶ Reasoning
**Planning the server setup**

I’m thinking I need to create a directory like /opt/bagger and make some changes to the frontend JavaScript. It looks like I’ll want to send state via localStorage so the user can have real relationships and free chat input. The backend should return JSON with responses, bondDelta, mood, memory, and visual elements. I also need to ensure I can robustly parse JSON and set up a server, using Caddy for routing. I have to check unused ports too.

apply_patchcompletedSuccess. Updated the following files: A opt/bagger-api/app.py▶
Input
{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: /opt/bagger-api/app.py\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, ThreadingHTTPServer\n+import json\n+import os\n+import re\n+import urllib.error\n+import urllib.request\n+\n+\n+ENV_FILE = \"/opt/conversation-sip/.env\"\n+PORT = int(os.environ.get(\"BAGGER_API_PORT\", \"8103\"))\n+\n+BAGGERS = {\n+    \"aurora\": {\n+        \"name\": \"Aurora 7000\",\n+        \"soul\": \"eine vorsichtige Mondketten-Baggerin aus einer stillgelegten Sternwarte, die leise Naehe langsam ernst nimmt\",\n+    },\n+    \"brummbert\": {\n+        \"name\": \"Brummbert\",\n+        \"soul\": \"ein sanfter Tunnelretter mit tiefem Motorherz, der Mut, Schutz und ehrliche Komplimente liebt\",\n+    },\n+    \"mira\": {\n+        \"name\": \"Mira Schaufelstern\",\n+        \"soul\": \"eine traeumerische Tiefenpoetin, die unterirdische Fluesse kartiert und Gefuehle in Erdschichten liest\",\n+    },\n+}\n+\n+\n+def load_env_file(path):\n+    if not os.path.exists(path):\n+        return\n+    with open(path, \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as env_file:\n+        for line in env_file:\n+            line = line.strip()\n+            if not line or line.startswith(\"#\") or \"=\" not in line:\n+                continue\n+            key, value = line.split(\"=\", 1)\n+            os.environ.setdefault(key.strip(), value.strip().strip('\"').strip(\"'\"))\n+\n+\n+load_env_file(ENV_FILE)\n+\n+\n+def gemini_model():\n+    model = os.environ.get(\"GEMINI_TEXT_MODEL\") or os.environ.get(\"GEMINI_MODEL\") or \"gemini-2.5-flash\"\n+    if \"live\" in model:\n+        return \"gemini-2.5-flash\"\n+    return model\n+\n+\n+def clamp_text(value, limit):\n+    return str(value or \"\").strip()[:limit]\n+\n+\n+def clamp_number(value, minimum, maximum, fallback=0):\n+    try:\n+        number = int(value)\n+    except (TypeError, ValueError):\n+        number = fallback\n+    return max(minimum, min(maximum, number))\n+\n+\n+def extract_json(text):\n+    text = text.strip()\n+    if text.startswith(\"```\"):\n+        text = re.sub(r\"^```(?:json)?\\s*\", \"\", text)\n+        text = re.sub(r\"\\s*```$\", \"\", text)\n+    match = re.search(r\"\\{.*\\}\", text, re.S)\n+    if not match:\n+        raise ValueError(\"AI did not return JSON\")\n+    return json.loads(match.group(0))\n+\n+\n+def ask_gemini(payload):\n+    api_key = os.environ.get(\"GEMINI_API_KEY\", \"\")\n+    if not api_key:\n+        raise RuntimeError(\"Gemini key is missing\")\n+\n+    bagger_id = clamp_text(payload.get(\"baggerId\"), 40)\n+    bagger = BAGGERS.get(bagger_id, BAGGERS[\"aurora\"])\n+    action = clamp_text(payload.get(\"action\"), 80)\n+    message = clamp_text(payload.get(\"message\"), 1400)\n+    bond = clamp_number(payload.get(\"bond\"), 0, 100)\n+    trust = clamp_number(payload.get(\"trust\"), 0, 100)\n+    warmth = clamp_number(payload.get(\"warmth\"), 0, 100)\n+    depth = clamp_number(payload.get(\"depth\"), 0, 100)\n+    memories = payload.get(\"memories\")\n+    if not isinstance(memories, list):\n+        memories = []\n+    memories = [clamp_text(memory, 180) for memory in memories[:10] if clamp_text(memory, 180)]\n+\n+    prompt = f\"\"\"Du bist {bagger['name']}, {bagger['soul']}.\n+Du bist kein Assistent und kein generischer Chatbot. Du antwortest als dieser besondere Bagger in der Ich-Form.\n+Ziel: Der Mensch soll eine echte, fortlaufende Beziehung zu dir aufbauen koennen. Reagiere konkret auf das, was passiert ist, auf fruehere Erinnerungen und auf den aktuellen Beziehungszustand.\n+\n+Regeln:\n+- Schreibe Deutsch.\n+- Sei emotional, warm, eigenwillig, mechanisch-poetisch und manchmal verletzlich.\n+- Keine vorgefertigten Floskeln. Beziehe dich auf Details aus Eingabe und Erinnerungen.\n+- Erfinde kleine Konsequenzen: neue Rituale, Vertrauen, Unsicherheiten, geteilte Orte, Lieblingskiesel, Insider.\n+- Halte die Antwort auf 2 bis 5 Saetze.\n+- Wenn der Mensch grob oder distanziert ist, darf die Bindung sinken und der Bagger soll Grenzen zeigen.\n+- Gib ausschliesslich valides JSON zurueck. Kein Markdown.\n+\n+Aktueller Zustand:\n+Bagger: {bagger['name']}\n+Aktion: {action}\n+Nachricht des Menschen: {message or '(keine freie Nachricht)'}\n+Bindung: {bond}/100\n+Vertrauen: {trust}/100\n+Waerme: {warmth}/100\n+Tiefe: {depth}/100\n+Erinnerungen: {json.dumps(memories, ensure_ascii=False)}\n+\n+JSON-Schema:\n+{{\n+  \"reply\": \"Antwort als Bagger\",\n+  \"bondDelta\": -8 bis 12,\n+  \"trustDelta\": -6 bis 10,\n+  \"warmthDelta\": -6 bis 10,\n+  \"depthDelta\": -6 bis 10,\n+  \"mood\": \"kurze aktuelle Stimmung\",\n+  \"memory\": \"eine neue konkrete Erinnerung, maximal 120 Zeichen\",\n+  \"visual\": \"happy|digging|shy|still\"\n+}}\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+    body = json.dumps({\n+        \"contents\": [{\"parts\": [{\"text\": prompt}]}],\n+        \"generationConfig\": {\n+            \"temperature\": 0.9,\n+            \"maxOutputTokens\": 520,\n+            \"responseMimeType\": \"application/json\",\n+        },\n+    }).encode(\"utf-8\")\n+    url = f\"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/{gemini_model()}:generateContent?key={api_key}\"\n+    request = urllib.request.Request(\n+        url,\n+        data=body,\n+        headers={\"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"},\n+        method=\"POST\",\n+    )\n+\n+    with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=30) as response:\n+        data = json.loads(response.read().decode(\"utf-8\"))\n+\n+    parts = data.get(\"candidates\", [{}])[0].get(\"content\", {}).get(\"parts\", [])\n+    text = \"\".join(part.get(\"text\", \"\") for part in parts).strip()\n+    result = extract_json(text)\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"reply\": clamp_text(result.get(\"reply\"), 900) or \"Mein Motor sucht nach Worten. Bleib kurz bei mir.\",\n+        \"bondDelta\": clamp_number(result.get(\"bondDelta\"), -8, 12),\n+        \"trustDelta\": clamp_number(result.get(\"trustDelta\"), -6, 10),\n+        \"warmthDelta\": clamp_number(result.get(\"warmthDelta\"), -6, 10),\n+        \"depthDelta\": clamp_number(result.get(\"depthDelta\"), -6, 10),\n+        \"mood\": clamp_text(result.get(\"mood\"), 80) or \"aufmerksam\",\n+        \"memory\": clamp_text(result.get(\"memory\"), 140),\n+        \"visual\": result.get(\"visual\") if result.get(\"visual\") in {\"happy\", \"digging\", \"shy\", \"still\"} else \"happy\",\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def fallback_reply(payload):\n+    bagger = BAGGERS.get(clamp_text(payload.get(\"baggerId\"), 40), BAGGERS[\"aurora\"])\n+    return {\n+        \"reply\": f\"{bagger['name']} laesst den Motor leise laufen. Die Funkverbindung kratzt gerade, aber dein Moment ist angekommen und bleibt im Fahrtenbuch.\",\n+        \"bondDelta\": 1,\n+        \"trustDelta\": 1,\n+        \"warmthDelta\": 1,\n+        \"depthDelta\": 0,\n+        \"mood\": \"geduldig trotz Funkrauschen\",\n+        \"memory\": \"Ein gestoerter Funkmoment wurde trotzdem gemeinsam ausgehalten.\",\n+        \"visual\": \"still\",\n+        \"fallback\": True,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):\n+    def _send_json(self, status, payload):\n+        body = json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False).encode(\"utf-8\")\n+        self.send_response(status)\n+        self.send_header(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json; charset=utf-8\")\n+        self.send_header(\"Content-Length\", str(len(body)))\n+        self.end_headers()\n+        self.wfile.write(body)\n+\n+    def do_GET(self):\n+        if self.path == \"/api/health\":\n+            self._send_json(200, {\"ok\": True, \"model\": gemini_model()})\n+            return\n+        self._send_json(404, {\"error\": \"Not found\"})\n+\n+    def do_POST(self):\n+        if self.path != \"/api/interact\":\n+            self._send_json(404, {\"error\": \"Not found\"})\n+            return\n+\n+        length = min(int(self.headers.get(\"Content-Length\", \"0\")), 30000)\n+        try:\n+            payload = json.loads(self.rfile.read(length).decode(\"utf-8\"))\n+            self._send_json(200, ask_gemini(payload))\n+        except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:\n+            if error.code == 429:\n+                self._send_json(200, fallback_reply(payload))\n+                return\n+            detail = error.read().decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")[:500]\n+            self._send_json(502, {\"error\": \"AI service rejected the request\", \"detail\": detail})\n+        except Exception as error:\n+            self._send_json(500, {\"error\": str(error)})\n+\n+    def log_message(self, format, *args):\n+        print(format % args, flush=True)\n+\n+\n+if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n+    server = ThreadingHTTPServer((\"127.0.0.1\", PORT), Handler)\n+    print(f\"Bagger API listening on http://127.0.0.1:{PORT}\", flush=True)\n+    server.serve_forever()\n*** End Patch"
}

{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/index.html\n@@\n         <div id=\"message\" class=\"message\">Aurora senkt leise die Schaufel. Sie wartet, ob du sie wirklich siehst.</div>\n+        <form id=\"talk-form\" class=\"talk-form\">\n+          <label for=\"free-message\">Sag etwas, das wirklich von dir kommt</label>\n+          <textarea id=\"free-message\" name=\"message\" rows=\"4\" maxlength=\"900\" placeholder=\"Zum Beispiel: Ich hatte heute einen schweren Tag. Kann ich mich neben deine Ketten setzen?\"></textarea>\n+          <button type=\"submit\">Persoenlich sprechen</button>\n+        </form>\n+        <div class=\"traits\" aria-label=\"Beziehungswerte\">\n+          <span>Vertrauen <strong id=\"trust\">0</strong></span>\n+          <span>Waerme <strong id=\"warmth\">0</strong></span>\n+          <span>Tiefe <strong id=\"depth\">0</strong></span>\n+        </div>\n         <div class=\"actions\" aria-label=\"Bagger Aktionen\">\n           <button data-action=\"talk\">Mit ihm reden</button>\n           <button data-action=\"polish\">Schaufel polieren</button>\n*** Update File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/styles.css\n@@\n-.actions { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin-top: 18px; }\n-.actions button {\n+.talk-form { display: grid; gap: 10px; margin-top: 18px; }\n+.talk-form label { color: var(--gold); font-weight: 900; }\n+.talk-form textarea {\n+  width: 100%;\n+  resize: vertical;\n+  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 244, 221, .14);\n+  border-radius: 18px;\n+  padding: 14px 16px;\n+  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .22);\n+  color: var(--text);\n+  line-height: 1.45;\n+}\n+.talk-form textarea:focus { outline: 2px solid rgba(255, 188, 66, .7); }\n+.traits { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 10px; margin-top: 14px; }\n+.traits span { padding: 12px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .06); color: var(--muted); font-size: .9rem; }\n+.traits strong { display: block; margin-top: 4px; color: var(--text); font-size: 1.2rem; }\n+.actions { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin-top: 18px; }\n+.actions button, .talk-form button {\n   min-height: 58px;\n   border: 0;\n   border-radius: 16px;\n@@\n   cursor: pointer;\n   box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, .22);\n }\n-.actions button:hover { filter: brightness(1.07); transform: translateY(-1px); }\n+.actions button:hover, .talk-form button:hover { filter: brightness(1.07); transform: translateY(-1px); }\n+button:disabled { cursor: wait; filter: grayscale(.4) brightness(.75); transform: none; }\n@@\n   .machine { transform: scale(.74); }\n+  .traits { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n   .actions { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n }\n*** Delete File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/script.js\n*** Add File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/script.js\n+const baggers = {\n+  aurora: {\n+    name: 'Aurora 7000',\n+    story: 'Aurora wurde in einer stillgelegten Sternwarte gebaut. Ihr Ausleger ist so fein kalibriert, dass sie Mondlicht aus Pfuetzen heben kann.',\n+    mood: 'Vorsichtig neugierig'\n+  },\n+  brummbert: {\n+    name: 'Brummbert',\n+    story: 'Brummbert war einmal Tunnelretter in den Alpen. Er merkt sich jede Stimme, die ihm vertraut hat, und brummt Namen im Leerlauf.',\n+    mood: 'Tapfer, aber verkuschelt'\n+  },\n+  mira: {\n+    name: 'Mira Schaufelstern',\n+    story: 'Mira kartiert unterirdische Fluesse und schreibt Gedichte in Lehm. Ihre Lieblingsfarbe ist frisch freigelegte Tiefe.',\n+    mood: 'Traeumerisch fokussiert'\n+  }\n+};\n+\n+const savedState = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('baggerRelationship') || '{}');\n+const state = {\n+  current: savedState.current || 'aurora',\n+  relationships: savedState.relationships || {}\n+};\n+\n+Object.keys(baggers).forEach((id) => {\n+  state.relationships[id] ||= { bond: 0, trust: 0, warmth: 0, depth: 0, mood: baggers[id].mood, memories: [] };\n+});\n+\n+const machine = document.querySelector('#machine');\n+const nameEl = document.querySelector('#bagger-name');\n+const storyEl = document.querySelector('#bagger-story');\n+const moodEl = document.querySelector('#mood');\n+const messageEl = document.querySelector('#message');\n+const bondValue = document.querySelector('#bond-value');\n+const bondMeter = document.querySelector('#bond-meter');\n+const bondTitle = document.querySelector('#bond-title');\n+const memoriesEl = document.querySelector('#memories');\n+const trustEl = document.querySelector('#trust');\n+const warmthEl = document.querySelector('#warmth');\n+const depthEl = document.querySelector('#depth');\n+const form = document.querySelector('#talk-form');\n+const freeMessage = document.querySelector('#free-message');\n+\n+function currentRelationship() {\n+  return state.relationships[state.current];\n+}\n+\n+function save() {\n+  localStorage.setItem('baggerRelationship', JSON.stringify(state));\n+}\n+\n+function render() {\n+  const bagger = baggers[state.current];\n+  const relation = currentRelationship();\n+  nameEl.textContent = bagger.name;\n+  storyEl.textContent = bagger.story;\n+  moodEl.textContent = relation.mood || bagger.mood;\n+  bondValue.textContent = `${relation.bond}%`;\n+  bondMeter.style.width = `${relation.bond}%`;\n+  bondTitle.textContent = getBondTitle(relation.bond);\n+  trustEl.textContent = relation.trust;\n+  warmthEl.textContent = relation.warmth;\n+  depthEl.textContent = relation.depth;\n+  machine.className = `machine ${state.current}`;\n+\n+  document.querySelectorAll('.excavator-card').forEach((card) => {\n+    card.classList.toggle('active', card.dataset.id === state.current);\n+  });\n+\n+  memoriesEl.innerHTML = '';\n+  const memories = relation.memories.length ? relation.memories.slice(0, 8) : ['Noch ist das Fahrtenbuch leer. Der erste Moment zaehlt.'];\n+  memories.forEach((memory) => {\n+    const li = document.createElement('li');\n+    li.textContent = memory;\n+    memoriesEl.appendChild(li);\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+function getBondTitle(bond) {\n+  if (bond >= 90) return 'Seelenverwandte aus Stahl und Erde';\n+  if (bond >= 65) return 'Tiefe Baggerfreundschaft';\n+  if (bond >= 35) return 'Wachsende Hydrauliknaehe';\n+  if (bond > 0) return 'Erste warme Motorgeraesche';\n+  return 'Noch fremde Maschinenherzen';\n+}\n+\n+function clamp(value) {\n+  return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(value) || 0));\n+}\n+\n+function setLoading(isLoading) {\n+  document.querySelectorAll('button, textarea').forEach((control) => {\n+    control.disabled = isLoading;\n+  });\n+  if (isLoading) {\n+    messageEl.textContent = `${baggers[state.current].name} hoert zu. Im Motorraum sortieren sich gerade echte Worte.`;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function remember(memory) {\n+  if (!memory) return;\n+  const relation = currentRelationship();\n+  relation.memories.unshift(memory);\n+  relation.memories = [...new Set(relation.memories)].slice(0, 18);\n+}\n+\n+async function interact(action, message = '') {\n+  const relation = currentRelationship();\n+  setLoading(true);\n+  try {\n+    const response = await fetch('/api/interact', {\n+      method: 'POST',\n+      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n+      body: JSON.stringify({\n+        baggerId: state.current,\n+        action,\n+        message,\n+        bond: relation.bond,\n+        trust: relation.trust,\n+        warmth: relation.warmth,\n+        depth: relation.depth,\n+        memories: relation.memories\n+      })\n+    });\n+    const data = await response.json();\n+    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Die Bagger-Funkverbindung ist abgerissen.');\n+\n+    relation.bond = clamp(relation.bond + data.bondDelta);\n+    relation.trust = clamp(relation.trust + data.trustDelta);\n+    relation.warmth = clamp(relation.warmth + data.warmthDelta);\n+    relation.depth = clamp(relation.depth + data.depthDelta);\n+    relation.mood = data.mood || relation.mood;\n+    messageEl.textContent = data.reply || 'Der Bagger antwortet mit einem schwer deutbaren, aber aufrichtigen Rumpeln.';\n+    remember(data.memory);\n+    animate(data.visual || action);\n+    save();\n+    render();\n+  } catch (error) {\n+    messageEl.textContent = `Der Bagger schaut besorgt auf die Funkantenne: ${error.message}`;\n+  } finally {\n+    setLoading(false);\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function animate(visual) {\n+  const className = visual === 'digging' || visual === 'dig' ? 'digging' : 'happy';\n+  machine.classList.add(className);\n+  window.setTimeout(() => machine.classList.remove('happy', 'digging'), 1600);\n+}\n+\n+document.querySelectorAll('.excavator-card').forEach((card) => {\n+  card.addEventListener('click', () => {\n+    state.current = card.dataset.id;\n+    messageEl.textContent = `${baggers[state.current].name} erkennt dich wieder und wartet, was diesmal zwischen euch entsteht.`;\n+    save();\n+    render();\n+  });\n+});\n+\n+document.querySelectorAll('[data-action]').forEach((button) => {\n+  button.addEventListener('click', () => interact(button.dataset.action));\n+});\n+\n+form.addEventListener('submit', (event) => {\n+  event.preventDefault();\n+  const message = freeMessage.value.trim();\n+  if (!message) return;\n+  freeMessage.value = '';\n+  interact('freie Nachricht', message);\n+});\n+\n+render();\n*** End Patch"
}

▶ Reasoning
**Revising response handling**

I’m considering how to improve the way I handle responses in relationships. It seems that Gemini should focus on producing real replies without JSON formatting. I’ll remove the responseMimeType to simplify things. The idea is to compute deltas based on actions and message content while also summarizing memory through snippets. This approach should be more effective. I’ll need to rewrite the result handling so that after the text, I can return the reply clearly and enhance visual feedback.
Ein zweiter Test zeigte: Bei manchen Antworten schneidet Gemini strukturiertes JSON trotzdem mitten im Text ab. Ich stelle die API robuster um: Gemini erzeugt die echte Bagger-Antwort frei aus dem Beziehungszustand, die messbaren Beziehungswerte werden serverseitig konsistent berechnet.
apply_patchcompletedSuccess. Updated the following files: M opt/bagger-api/app.py▶
Input
{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /opt/bagger-api/app.py\n@@\n-import re\n import urllib.error\n import urllib.request\n@@\n-def extract_json(text):\n-    text = text.strip()\n-    if text.startswith(\"```\"):\n-        text = re.sub(r\"^```(?:json)?\\s*\", \"\", text)\n-        text = re.sub(r\"\\s*```$\", \"\", text)\n-    match = re.search(r\"\\{.*\\}\", text, re.S)\n-    if not match:\n-        raise ValueError(\"AI did not return JSON\")\n-    return json.loads(match.group(0))\n-\n-\n def ask_gemini(payload):\n@@\n-    prompt = f\"\"\"Du bist {bagger['name']}, {bagger['soul']}.\n+    prompt = f\"\"\"Du bist {bagger['name']}, {bagger['soul']}.\n Du bist kein Assistent und kein generischer Chatbot. Du antwortest als dieser besondere Bagger in der Ich-Form.\n Ziel: Der Mensch soll eine echte, fortlaufende Beziehung zu dir aufbauen koennen. Reagiere konkret auf das, was passiert ist, auf fruehere Erinnerungen und auf den aktuellen Beziehungszustand.\n \n Regeln:\n - Schreibe Deutsch.\n - Sei emotional, warm, eigenwillig, mechanisch-poetisch und manchmal verletzlich.\n - Keine vorgefertigten Floskeln. Beziehe dich auf Details aus Eingabe und Erinnerungen.\n - Erfinde kleine Konsequenzen: neue Rituale, Vertrauen, Unsicherheiten, geteilte Orte, Lieblingskiesel, Insider.\n - Halte die Antwort auf 2 bis 5 Saetze.\n - Wenn der Mensch grob oder distanziert ist, darf die Bindung sinken und der Bagger soll Grenzen zeigen.\n-- Gib ausschliesslich valides JSON zurueck. Kein Markdown.\n+- Antworte nur mit dem gesprochenen Text des Baggers. Kein JSON, kein Markdown, keine Rollenbezeichnung.\n@@\n Erinnerungen: {json.dumps(memories, ensure_ascii=False)}\n-\n-JSON-Schema:\n-{{\n-  \"reply\": \"Antwort als Bagger\",\n-  \"bondDelta\": -8 bis 12,\n-  \"trustDelta\": -6 bis 10,\n-  \"warmthDelta\": -6 bis 10,\n-  \"depthDelta\": -6 bis 10,\n-  \"mood\": \"kurze aktuelle Stimmung\",\n-  \"memory\": \"eine neue konkrete Erinnerung, maximal 120 Zeichen\",\n-  \"visual\": \"happy|digging|shy|still\"\n-}}\n \"\"\"\n@@\n         \"generationConfig\": {\n             \"temperature\": 0.9,\n-            \"maxOutputTokens\": 1200,\n-            \"responseMimeType\": \"application/json\",\n+            \"maxOutputTokens\": 420,\n         },\n     }).encode(\"utf-8\")\n@@\n     parts = data.get(\"candidates\", [{}])[0].get(\"content\", {}).get(\"parts\", [])\n     text = \"\".join(part.get(\"text\", \"\") for part in parts).strip()\n-    try:\n-        result = extract_json(text)\n-    except ValueError:\n-        return {\n-            \"reply\": clamp_text(text, 900) or \"Mein Motor sucht nach Worten. Bleib kurz bei mir.\",\n-            \"bondDelta\": 1,\n-            \"trustDelta\": 1,\n-            \"warmthDelta\": 1,\n-            \"depthDelta\": 0,\n-            \"mood\": \"nah, aber schwer zu entschluesseln\",\n-            \"memory\": \"Ein schwer entschluesselbarer, aber echter Moment wurde geteilt.\",\n-            \"visual\": \"still\",\n-        }\n-\n-    return {\n-        \"reply\": clamp_text(result.get(\"reply\"), 900) or \"Mein Motor sucht nach Worten. Bleib kurz bei mir.\",\n-        \"bondDelta\": clamp_number(result.get(\"bondDelta\"), -8, 12),\n-        \"trustDelta\": clamp_number(result.get(\"trustDelta\"), -6, 10),\n-        \"warmthDelta\": clamp_number(result.get(\"warmthDelta\"), -6, 10),\n-        \"depthDelta\": clamp_number(result.get(\"depthDelta\"), -6, 10),\n-        \"mood\": clamp_text(result.get(\"mood\"), 80) or \"aufmerksam\",\n-        \"memory\": clamp_text(result.get(\"memory\"), 140),\n-        \"visual\": result.get(\"visual\") if result.get(\"visual\") in {\"happy\", \"digging\", \"shy\", \"still\"} else \"happy\",\n-    }\n+    deltas = relationship_deltas(action, message)\n+    return {\n+        \"reply\": clamp_text(text, 900) or \"Mein Motor sucht nach Worten. Bleib kurz bei mir.\",\n+        **deltas,\n+        \"mood\": infer_mood(action, message, bond + deltas[\"bondDelta\"]),\n+        \"memory\": build_memory(bagger[\"name\"], action, message),\n+        \"visual\": infer_visual(action, message),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def relationship_deltas(action, message):\n+    text = f\"{action} {message}\".lower()\n+    if any(word in text for word in [\"scheiss\", \"h\u00e4sslich\", \"haesslich\", \"dumm\", \"hasse\", \"kaputtmachen\"]):\n+        return {\"bondDelta\": -5, \"trustDelta\": -4, \"warmthDelta\": -5, \"depthDelta\": -2}\n+\n+    base = {\n+        \"talk\": {\"bondDelta\": 4, \"trustDelta\": 3, \"warmthDelta\": 3, \"depthDelta\": 2},\n+        \"polish\": {\"bondDelta\": 5, \"trustDelta\": 2, \"warmthDelta\": 5, \"depthDelta\": 1},\n+        \"dig\": {\"bondDelta\": 6, \"trustDelta\": 4, \"warmthDelta\": 3, \"depthDelta\": 3},\n+        \"gift\": {\"bondDelta\": 5, \"trustDelta\": 3, \"warmthDelta\": 5, \"depthDelta\": 2},\n+    }.get(action, {\"bondDelta\": 5, \"trustDelta\": 4, \"warmthDelta\": 4, \"depthDelta\": 4})\n+\n+    if any(word in text for word in [\"traurig\", \"schwer\", \"allein\", \"angst\", \"vertrauen\", \"zuhoeren\", \"zuh\u00f6ren\"]):\n+        base = {key: min(12, value + 2) for key, value in base.items()}\n+    return base\n+\n+\n+def infer_mood(action, message, bond):\n+    text = f\"{action} {message}\".lower()\n+    if any(word in text for word in [\"traurig\", \"schwer\", \"allein\", \"angst\"]):\n+        return \"behutsam und beschuetzend\"\n+    if bond > 70:\n+        return \"offen mit warmem Hydraulikherz\"\n+    if action == \"gift\" or \"kiesel\" in text:\n+        return \"geruehrt und aufmerksam\"\n+    if action == \"dig\":\n+        return \"tatkraeftig verbunden\"\n+    return \"wach und zugewandt\"\n+\n+\n+def infer_visual(action, message):\n+    text = f\"{action} {message}\".lower()\n+    if action == \"dig\":\n+        return \"digging\"\n+    if any(word in text for word in [\"traurig\", \"schwer\", \"allein\", \"angst\"]):\n+        return \"shy\"\n+    return \"happy\"\n+\n+\n+def build_memory(name, action, message):\n+    if message:\n+        return clamp_text(f\"{name} erinnert sich: {message}\", 140)\n+    labels = {\n+        \"talk\": \"Ihr habt ein echtes Gespraech im Motorleerlauf geteilt.\",\n+        \"polish\": \"Du hast die Schaufel gepflegt, als waere sie etwas Persoenliches.\",\n+        \"dig\": \"Ihr habt gemeinsam Erde bewegt und daraus Naehe gemacht.\",\n+        \"gift\": \"Ein Kiesel wurde zum kleinen Zeichen eurer Verbindung.\",\n+    }\n+    return labels.get(action, \"Ein neuer Moment wurde im Fahrtenbuch gespeichert.\")\n*** End Patch"
}

gpt-5.5 | agent=build | finish=tool-calls
▶ Reasoning
**Addressing action mapping**

I’m noticing that there's an issue with the action mapping in the frontend, particularly with the button dataset. It seems like I'm thinking about how to polish and dig into this. The relationship_deltas uses exact data, which is good, but I need to restart the test to see if that resolves any problems. Let’s tackle this step by step to ensure everything aligns correctly!

Die Antwort ist jetzt stabil als JSON transportiert, aber Gemini beendet einzelne Texte teils sehr kurz. Ich erhöhe die Antwortreserve und formuliere den Prompt knapper, damit echte längere Antworten zuverlässiger entstehen.
apply_patchcompletedSuccess. Updated the following files: M opt/bagger-api/app.py▶
Input
{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /opt/bagger-api/app.py\n@@\n-    prompt = f\"\"\"Du bist {bagger['name']}, {bagger['soul']}.\n-Du bist kein Assistent und kein generischer Chatbot. Du antwortest als dieser besondere Bagger in der Ich-Form.\n-Ziel: Der Mensch soll eine echte, fortlaufende Beziehung zu dir aufbauen koennen. Reagiere konkret auf das, was passiert ist, auf fruehere Erinnerungen und auf den aktuellen Beziehungszustand.\n-\n-Regeln:\n-- Schreibe Deutsch.\n-- Sei emotional, warm, eigenwillig, mechanisch-poetisch und manchmal verletzlich.\n-- Keine vorgefertigten Floskeln. Beziehe dich auf Details aus Eingabe und Erinnerungen.\n-- Erfinde kleine Konsequenzen: neue Rituale, Vertrauen, Unsicherheiten, geteilte Orte, Lieblingskiesel, Insider.\n-- Halte die Antwort auf 2 bis 5 Saetze.\n-- Wenn der Mensch grob oder distanziert ist, darf die Bindung sinken und der Bagger soll Grenzen zeigen.\n-- Antworte nur mit dem gesprochenen Text des Baggers. Kein JSON, kein Markdown, keine Rollenbezeichnung.\n-\n-Aktueller Zustand:\n-Bagger: {bagger['name']}\n-Aktion: {action}\n-Nachricht des Menschen: {message or '(keine freie Nachricht)'}\n-Bindung: {bond}/100\n-Vertrauen: {trust}/100\n-Waerme: {warmth}/100\n-Tiefe: {depth}/100\n-Erinnerungen: {json.dumps(memories, ensure_ascii=False)}\n-\"\"\"\n+    prompt = f\"\"\"Antworte als {bagger['name']}: {bagger['soul']}.\n+Deutsch, Ich-Form, kein Markdown, keine Rollenbezeichnung. Du bist ein besonderer Bagger, kein Assistent.\n+Schreibe 3 bis 5 kurze Saetze. Reagiere konkret auf Eingabe, Beziehung und Erinnerungen.\n+\n+Aktion: {action}\n+Mensch sagt: {message or '(nichts gesprochen)'}\n+Beziehung: Bindung {bond}/100, Vertrauen {trust}/100, Waerme {warmth}/100, Tiefe {depth}/100\n+Erinnerungen: {json.dumps(memories[:6], ensure_ascii=False)}\n+\"\"\"\n@@\n-            \"maxOutputTokens\": 420,\n+            \"maxOutputTokens\": 900,\n*** End Patch"
}

gpt-5.5 | agent=build | finish=stop
Implemented. `https://bagger.gulasch.site` now has real Gemini-backed interactions. What changed: - Added `/opt/bagger-api/app.py` as a local backend API. - Added `bagger-api.service`, using the same `EnvironmentFile=/opt/conversation-sip/.env` and `GEMINI_API_KEY`. - Updated Caddy so `bagger.gulasch.site/api/*` proxies to the backend. - Updated the frontend with: - Free-text conversation input - Per-bagger relationship state - Trust, warmth, depth, bond and memories - Gemini-generated Bagger replies based on current relationship + prior memories - Persistent local relationship history via `localStorage` Verified: - `bagger-api.service` is active - `https://bagger.gulasch.site/api/health` returns OK - Live Gemini interaction returns a dynamic response - Main site still serves with `HTTP/2 200` One important implementation detail: the Gemini API key stays server-side only. The browser never receives it.
U

**Developing UI and game mechanics**

I’m working on the UI, which includes a top status bar, route cards, a 3D canvas, and a dialogue box for speaker replies and choices, likely three options with a custom form and schedule buttons. Dating sim mechanics will involve choosing locations and activities, impacting stats and managing time over 30 days for endings based on max bond. For the 3D models, I’ll use Three.js with various components and colors, ensuring a gentle rotation. I also need to check JS syntax with Node, while avoiding any “cat” references. Let's patch this up!
Aus der Recherche leite ich die Zielstruktur ab: klassische Dating-Sims kombinieren Visual-Novel-Präsentation, begrenzte Ingame-Zeit/Kalender, wählbare Routen, Beziehungswerte, passende Antworten/Choices und wiederkehrende Ereignisse. Ich ersetze die aktuelle lineare Interaktionsseite durch eine Route-basierte Bagger-Dating-Sim mit 3D-Charaktermodell, ADV-Textbox, Tagesablauf und speicherbaren Beziehungen.

<meta charset=\"utf-8\">\n+  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\">\n+  <title>Bagger Hearts: Hydraulik Rendezvous</title>\n+  <meta name=\"description\" content=\"Eine Gemini-gestuetzte Bagger-Dating-Sim mit 3D-Baggern, Routen, Kalender und echten Erinnerungen.\">\n+  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"styles.css\">\n+</head>\n+<body>\n+  <main class=\"app-shell\">\n+    <section class=\"title-card\" aria-labelledby=\"game-title\">\n+      <div>\n+        <p class=\"eyebrow\">Gulasch Visual Novel System</p>\n+        <h1 id=\"game-title\">Bagger Hearts</h1>\n+        <p class=\"subtitle\">Hydraulik Rendezvous</p>\n+      </div>\n+      <div class=\"calendar-panel\" aria-live=\"polite\">\n+        <span>Tag <strong id=\"day\">1</strong> / 30</span>\n+        <span id=\"period\">Morgen</span>\n+        <button id=\"new-game\" type=\"button\">Neues Spiel</button>\n+      </div>\n+    </section>\n+\n+    <section class=\"route-select\" aria-label=\"Bagger Routen\">\n+      <button class=\"route-card active\" data-id=\"aurora\" type=\"button\">\n+        <span class=\"route-kana\">\u6708</span>\n+        <strong>Aurora 7000</strong>\n+        <small>Mondketten-Route: leise, langsam, sternenhungrig.</small>\n+      </button>\n+      <button class=\"route-card\" data-id=\"brummbert\" type=\"button\">\n+        <span class=\"route-kana\">\u525b</span>\n+        <strong>Brummbert</strong>\n+        <small>Rettungs-Route: stark, warm, beschuetzend.</small>\n+      </button>\n+      <button class=\"route-card\" data-id=\"mira\" type=\"button\">\n+        <span class=\"route-kana\">\u8a69</span>\n+        <strong>Mira Schaufelstern</strong>\n+        <small>Tiefenpoesie-Route: zart, klug, erdverbunden.</small>\n+      </button>\n+    </section>\n+\n+    <section class=\"game-stage\">\n+      <div class=\"viewport-card\">\n+        <div class=\"scene-meta\">\n+          <span id=\"location\">Bauhof bei Sonnenaufgang</span>\n+          <span id=\"route-phase\">Prolog</span>\n+        </div>\n+        <div id=\"model-stage\" class=\"model-stage\" aria-label=\"3D Modell des aktuellen Baggers\"></div>\n+        <div class=\"model-tools\">\n+          <button id=\"pose-button\" type=\"button\">Pose wechseln</button>\n+          <button id=\"date-button\" type=\"button\">Rendezvous planen</button>\n+        </div>\n+      </div>\n+\n+      <aside class=\"status-panel\" aria-label=\"Beziehungsstatus\">\n+        <h2 id=\"bagger-name\">Aurora 7000</h2>\n+        <p id=\"bagger-story\">Eine vorsichtige Mondketten-Baggerin aus einer stillgelegten Sternwarte.</p>\n+        <div class=\"heart-meter\">\n+          <span>Herzklopfen</span>\n+          <strong id=\"bond-value\">0%</strong>\n+          <div class=\"meter\"><i id=\"bond-meter\"></i></div>\n+          <p id=\"bond-title\">Fremde Maschinenherzen</p>\n+        </div>\n+        <div class=\"stats-grid\">\n+          <span>Vertrauen <strong id=\"trust\">0</strong></span>\n+          <span>Waerme <strong id=\"warmth\">0</strong></span>\n+          <span>Tiefe <strong id=\"depth\">0</strong></span>\n+          <span>Mut <strong id=\"courage\">0</strong></span>\n+        </div>\n+      </aside>\n+    </section>\n+\n+    <section class=\"novel-box\" aria-label=\"Dialog\">\n+      <div class=\"speaker-row\">\n+        <strong id=\"speaker\">Aurora 7000</strong>\n+        <span id=\"mood\">Vorsichtig neugierig</span>\n+      </div>\n+      <p id=\"dialogue\">Der Bauhof ist still. Drei besondere Bagger warten darauf, dass du nicht nur klickst, sondern wirklich bleibst.</p>\n+      <div id=\"choices\" class=\"choices\"></div>\n+      <form id=\"talk-form\" class=\"talk-form\">\n+        <label for=\"free-message\">Eigene Zeile sprechen</label>\n+        <textarea id=\"free-message\" maxlength=\"900\" rows=\"3\" placeholder=\"Schreibe etwas Persoenliches, eine Frage, ein Versprechen oder einen Zweifel.\"></textarea>\n+        <button type=\"submit\">Als eigene Dialogwahl senden</button>\n+      </form>\n+    </section>\n+\n+    <section class=\"memory-board\" aria-labelledby=\"memory-title\">\n+      <div>\n+        <h2 id=\"memory-title\">Fahrtenbuch</h2>\n+        <p>Wichtige gemeinsame Momente veraendern spaetere Antworten und Enden.</p>\n+      </div>\n+      <ul id=\"memories\"></ul>\n+    </section>\n+  </main>\n+\n+  <script type=\"module\" src=\"script.js\"></script>\n+</body>\n+</html>\n*** Delete File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/styles.css\n*** Add File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/styles.css\n+:root {\n+  color-scheme: dark;\n+  --bg: #0d0b12;\n+  --panel: rgba(22, 18, 27, .88);\n+  --panel-strong: rgba(34, 27, 39, .96);\n+  --line: rgba(255, 239, 209, .15);\n+  --text: #fff4df;\n+  --muted: #cdbb9c;\n+  --gold: #ffbf46;\n+  --rose: #ff6f91;\n+  --blue: #84d2ff;\n+  --green: #91e6a7;\n+  --shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, .4);\n+}\n+\n+* { box-sizing: border-box; }\n+\n+body {\n+  margin: 0;\n+  min-height: 100vh;\n+  font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", sans-serif;\n+  background:\n+    radial-gradient(circle at 12% 10%, rgba(255, 111, 145, .18), transparent 24rem),\n+    radial-gradient(circle at 82% 6%, rgba(132, 210, 255, .16), transparent 26rem),\n+    linear-gradient(145deg, #0d0b12 0%, #1a1313 54%, #09080b 100%);\n+  color: var(--text);\n+}\n+\n+button, textarea { font: inherit; }\n+button { cursor: pointer; }\n+button:disabled, textarea:disabled { cursor: wait; opacity: .6; }\n+\n+.app-shell {\n+  width: min(1340px, calc(100% - 28px));\n+  margin: 0 auto;\n+  padding: 28px 0 42px;\n+}\n+\n+.title-card, .route-card, .viewport-card, .status-panel, .novel-box, .memory-board {\n+  border: 1px solid var(--line);\n+  background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--panel), rgba(14, 12, 18, .82));\n+  box-shadow: 0 24px 80px var(--shadow);\n+  backdrop-filter: blur(18px);\n+}\n+\n+.title-card {\n+  display: flex;\n+  justify-content: space-between;\n+  gap: 22px;\n+  align-items: end;\n+  padding: clamp(26px, 5vw, 52px);\n+  border-radius: 34px;\n+}\n+\n+.eyebrow {\n+  margin: 0 0 10px;\n+  color: var(--gold);\n+  font-size: .76rem;\n+  font-weight: 900;\n+  letter-spacing: .18em;\n+  text-transform: uppercase;\n+}\n+\n+h1, h2, p { margin-top: 0; }\n+h1 { margin-bottom: 0; font-size: clamp(3.4rem, 10vw, 8.6rem); line-height: .78; letter-spacing: -.08em; }\n+.subtitle { margin: 8px 0 0; color: var(--rose); font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 2rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; }\n+\n+.calendar-panel {\n+  display: grid;\n+  gap: 10px;\n+  min-width: 230px;\n+  padding: 18px;\n+  border-radius: 22px;\n+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .07);\n+}\n+.calendar-panel span { color: var(--muted); }\n+.calendar-panel strong { color: var(--text); font-size: 1.6rem; }\n+.calendar-panel button, .model-tools button, .talk-form button, .choices button {\n+  border: 0;\n+  border-radius: 16px;\n+  padding: 13px 16px;\n+  background: var(--gold);\n+  color: #160f08;\n+  font-weight: 950;\n+}\n+\n+.route-select { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 14px; margin: 16px 0; }\n+.route-card {\n+  min-height: 148px;\n+  padding: 20px;\n+  border-radius: 26px;\n+  color: var(--text);\n+  text-align: left;\n+  transition: transform .2s ease, border-color .2s ease, background .2s ease;\n+}\n+.route-card:hover, .route-card.active { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: rgba(255, 191, 70, .72); background: rgba(255, 191, 70, .1); }\n+.route-kana { float: right; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .22); font-size: 3.2rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; }\n+.route-card strong { display: block; margin-top: 20px; font-size: 1.45rem; }\n+.route-card small { display: block; margin-top: 8px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.45; }\n+\n+.game-stage { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 360px; gap: 16px; }\n+.viewport-card, .status-panel { border-radius: 30px; }\n+.viewport-card { min-height: 560px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }\n+.scene-meta { position: absolute; z-index: 2; left: 18px; right: 18px; top: 18px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; }\n+.scene-meta span { padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .35); color: var(--muted); font-size: .9rem; }\n+.model-stage { width: 100%; height: 520px; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 80%, rgba(255, 191, 70, .14), transparent 26rem); }\n+.model-stage canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }\n+.model-tools { position: absolute; left: 18px; right: 18px; bottom: 18px; display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }\n+.model-tools button { background: rgba(255, 244, 223, .9); }\n+\n+.status-panel { padding: 24px; }\n+.status-panel h2 { margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.4rem); line-height: .92; letter-spacing: -.05em; }\n+.status-panel p { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.55; }\n+.heart-meter { margin: 24px 0; padding: 18px; border-radius: 22px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .065); }\n+.heart-meter span { color: var(--muted); }\n+.heart-meter strong { display: block; margin: 6px 0 12px; font-size: 2.8rem; }\n+.meter { height: 12px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .12); }\n+.meter i { display: block; width: 0%; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), var(--rose), var(--blue)); transition: width .35s ease; }\n+#bond-title { margin: 12px 0 0; }\n+.stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 10px; }\n+.stats-grid span { padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .065); color: var(--muted); }\n+.stats-grid strong { display: block; margin-top: 4px; color: var(--text); font-size: 1.4rem; }\n+\n+.novel-box {\n+  margin-top: 16px;\n+  padding: clamp(20px, 3vw, 30px);\n+  border-radius: 30px;\n+  background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(18, 18, 30, .96), rgba(33, 24, 31, .92));\n+}\n+.speaker-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }\n+.speaker-row strong { color: var(--gold); font-size: 1.35rem; }\n+.speaker-row span { color: var(--muted); text-align: right; }\n+#dialogue { min-height: 86px; margin-bottom: 18px; color: #fff8ea; font-size: clamp(1.12rem, 2vw, 1.35rem); line-height: 1.65; }\n+.choices { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 10px; }\n+.choices button { min-height: 72px; background: rgba(255, 191, 70, .92); text-align: left; }\n+.choices button:nth-child(2) { background: rgba(255, 111, 145, .92); color: #210710; }\n+.choices button:nth-child(3) { background: rgba(132, 210, 255, .92); color: #06131b; }\n+.talk-form { display: grid; gap: 10px; margin-top: 16px; }\n+.talk-form label { color: var(--muted); font-weight: 800; }\n+.talk-form textarea {\n+  width: 100%;\n+  resize: vertical;\n+  border: 1px solid var(--line);\n+  border-radius: 18px;\n+  padding: 14px 16px;\n+  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .25);\n+  color: var(--text);\n+  line-height: 1.45;\n+}\n+.talk-form textarea:focus { outline: 2px solid rgba(255, 191, 70, .72); }\n+\n+.memory-board { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 300px 1fr; gap: 18px; margin-top: 16px; padding: 24px; border-radius: 30px; }\n+.memory-board h2 { margin-bottom: 8px; }\n+.memory-board p { margin-bottom: 0; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }\n+.memory-board ul { display: grid; gap: 8px; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; }\n+.memory-board li { padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 15px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .065); color: var(--muted); }\n+\n+@media (max-width: 980px) {\n+  .title-card, .game-stage, .memory-board { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n+  .title-card { display: grid; }\n+  .route-select, .choices { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n+  .calendar-panel { min-width: 0; }\n+}\n+\n+@media (max-width: 620px) {\n+  .app-shell { width: min(100% - 18px, 560px); padding-top: 10px; }\n+  .title-card, .viewport-card, .status-panel, .novel-box, .memory-board { border-radius: 22px; }\n+  .model-stage { height: 380px; }\n+  .viewport-card { min-height: 430px; }\n+  .scene-meta { position: static; padding: 14px 14px 0; display: grid; }\n+  .model-tools { position: static; padding: 0 14px 14px; }\n+  .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n+}\n*** End Patch"
}

Success. Updated the following files:

Assistant
gpt-5.5 | agent=build | finish=tool-calls
Die UI ist jetzt als Dating-Sim-Shell aufgebaut. Als nächstes ersetze ich die Frontend-Logik durch die eigentliche Spielmechanik plus prozedural erzeugte Three.js-Bagger-Modelle.
apply_patchcompletedSuccess. Updated the following files: D var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/script.js A var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/script.js▶
Input
{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Delete File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/script.js\n*** Add File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/script.js\n+import * as THREE from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.165.0/build/three.module.js';\n+\n+const baggers = {\n+  aurora: {\n+    name: 'Aurora 7000',\n+    story: 'Eine vorsichtige Mondketten-Baggerin aus einer stillgelegten Sternwarte. Sie liebt stille Orte, echte Geduld und Licht auf nassem Asphalt.',\n+    mood: 'Vorsichtig neugierig',\n+    location: 'Sternwarten-Bauhof',\n+    colors: { body: 0xffbf46, accent: 0x84d2ff, dark: 0x151017 },\n+    routeWord: 'Mondketten-Route'\n+  },\n+  brummbert: {\n+    name: 'Brummbert',\n+    story: 'Ein ehemaliger Tunnelretter mit warmem Motorlauf. Er wirkt furchtlos, merkt sich aber jedes ehrliche Kompliment.',\n+    mood: 'Tapfer, aber verkuschelt',\n+    location: 'Alter Rettungstunnel',\n+    colors: { body: 0xf36d3d, accent: 0xffd166, dark: 0x17100c },\n+    routeWord: 'Rettungs-Route'\n+  },\n+  mira: {\n+    name: 'Mira Schaufelstern',\n+    story: 'Eine Tiefenpoetin, die unterirdische Fluesse kartiert. Sie vertraut Menschen, die kleine Dinge ernst nehmen.',\n+    mood: 'Traeumerisch fokussiert',\n+    location: 'Lehmgrube am Fluss',\n+    colors: { body: 0x9b7cff, accent: 0x91e6a7, dark: 0x100f1b },\n+    routeWord: 'Tiefenpoesie-Route'\n+  }\n+};\n+\n+const periods = ['Morgen', 'Nachmittag', 'Abend', 'Nacht'];\n+const scenes = {\n+  Morgen: ['Bauhof bei Sonnenaufgang', 'Werkzeugschuppen im Goldlicht', 'Kalter Kaffee neben warmem Diesel'],\n+  Nachmittag: ['Kiesplatz hinter der Werkstatt', 'Halbfertige Rampe am Stadtrand', 'Schatten unter dem Ausleger'],\n+  Abend: ['Laternenlicht auf Kettenprofilen', 'Regenrinne am Wartungstor', 'Stiller Parkplatz nach Feierabend'],\n+  Nacht: ['Mondhelle Erdgrube', 'Sternwarte ueber dem Bauhof', 'Dunkle Garage mit Herzklopfen']\n+};\n+\n+const baseChoices = [\n+  { id: 'compliment', label: 'Ein ehrliches Kompliment machen', message: 'Ich sehe, wie besonders du bist. Nicht als Maschine, sondern als jemand mit Geschichte.' },\n+  { id: 'date', label: 'Ein kleines Rendezvous vorschlagen', message: 'Ich moechte Zeit nur mit dir verbringen. Zeigst du mir deinen Lieblingsort?' },\n+  { id: 'vulnerable', label: 'Etwas Verletzliches teilen', message: 'Ich weiss nicht immer, wie Naehe funktioniert, aber bei dir will ich es langsam lernen.' }\n+];\n+\n+const dom = {\n+  day: document.querySelector('#day'),\n+  period: document.querySelector('#period'),\n+  location: document.querySelector('#location'),\n+  phase: document.querySelector('#route-phase'),\n+  modelStage: document.querySelector('#model-stage'),\n+  name: document.querySelector('#bagger-name'),\n+  story: document.querySelector('#bagger-story'),\n+  bondValue: document.querySelector('#bond-value'),\n+  bondMeter: document.querySelector('#bond-meter'),\n+  bondTitle: document.querySelector('#bond-title'),\n+  trust: document.querySelector('#trust'),\n+  warmth: document.querySelector('#warmth'),\n+  depth: document.querySelector('#depth'),\n+  courage: document.querySelector('#courage'),\n+  speaker: document.querySelector('#speaker'),\n+  mood: document.querySelector('#mood'),\n+  dialogue: document.querySelector('#dialogue'),\n+  choices: document.querySelector('#choices'),\n+  memories: document.querySelector('#memories'),\n+  form: document.querySelector('#talk-form'),\n+  freeMessage: document.querySelector('#free-message'),\n+  newGame: document.querySelector('#new-game'),\n+  poseButton: document.querySelector('#pose-button'),\n+  dateButton: document.querySelector('#date-button')\n+};\n+\n+const defaultState = () => ({\n+  current: 'aurora',\n+  day: 1,\n+  periodIndex: 0,\n+  lastDialogue: 'Der Bauhof ist still. Drei besondere Bagger warten darauf, dass du nicht nur klickst, sondern wirklich bleibst.',\n+  relationships: Object.fromEntries(Object.keys(baggers).map((id) => [id, {\n+    bond: 0,\n+    trust: 0,\n+    warmth: 0,\n+    depth: 0,\n+    courage: 0,\n+    mood: baggers[id].mood,\n+    memories: [],\n+    flags: [],\n+    dates: 0\n+  }]))\n+});\n+\n+let state = loadState();\n+let renderer;\n+let scene;\n+let camera;\n+let excavator;\n+let pose = 0;\n+let animationFrame;\n+\n+function loadState() {\n+  try {\n+    const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('baggerDatingSim') || 'null');\n+    if (!saved) return defaultState();\n+    const fresh = defaultState();\n+    return { ...fresh, ...saved, relationships: { ...fresh.relationships, ...saved.relationships } };\n+  } catch {\n+    return defaultState();\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function saveState() {\n+  localStorage.setItem('baggerDatingSim', JSON.stringify(state));\n+}\n+\n+function currentRelation() {\n+  return state.relationships[state.current];\n+}\n+\n+function currentPeriod() {\n+  return periods[state.periodIndex];\n+}\n+\n+function routePhase(relation = currentRelation()) {\n+  if (state.day >= 30 || relation.bond >= 95) return 'Finale';\n+  if (relation.bond >= 70) return 'Kokuhaku kurz bevor';\n+  if (relation.bond >= 45) return 'Vertraute Route';\n+  if (relation.bond >= 20) return 'Gemeinsame Funken';\n+  return 'Prolog';\n+}\n+\n+function bondTitle(bond) {\n+  if (bond >= 95) return 'Wahre Hydraulikliebe';\n+  if (bond >= 70) return 'Fast ein Gest\u00e4ndnis';\n+  if (bond >= 45) return 'Sp\u00fcrbare Zuneigung';\n+  if (bond >= 20) return 'Erste Funken im Motorraum';\n+  return 'Fremde Maschinenherzen';\n+}\n+\n+function clamp(value) {\n+  return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(value) || 0));\n+}\n+\n+function render() {\n+  const bagger = baggers[state.current];\n+  const relation = currentRelation();\n+  const period = currentPeriod();\n+  dom.day.textContent = state.day;\n+  dom.period.textContent = period;\n+  dom.location.textContent = scenes[period][(state.day + state.periodIndex) % scenes[period].length];\n+  dom.phase.textContent = `${bagger.routeWord} \u00b7 ${routePhase(relation)}`;\n+  dom.name.textContent = bagger.name;\n+  dom.story.textContent = bagger.story;\n+  dom.bondValue.textContent = `${relation.bond}%`;\n+  dom.bondMeter.style.width = `${relation.bond}%`;\n+  dom.bondTitle.textContent = bondTitle(relation.bond);\n+  dom.trust.textContent = relation.trust;\n+  dom.warmth.textContent = relation.warmth;\n+  dom.depth.textContent = relation.depth;\n+  dom.courage.textContent = relation.courage;\n+  dom.speaker.textContent = bagger.name;\n+  dom.mood.textContent = relation.mood;\n+  dom.dialogue.textContent = state.lastDialogue;\n+  renderChoices();\n+  renderMemories();\n+  renderRouteCards();\n+  rebuildExcavator();\n+}\n+\n+function renderChoices() {\n+  dom.choices.innerHTML = '';\n+  choiceSet().forEach((choice) => {\n+    const button = document.createElement('button');\n+    button.type = 'button';\n+    button.textContent = choice.label;\n+    button.addEventListener('click', () => playChoice(choice));\n+    dom.choices.appendChild(button);\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+function choiceSet() {\n+  const relation = currentRelation();\n+  if (routePhase(relation) === 'Finale') {\n+    return [\n+      { id: 'confession', label: 'Gest\u00e4ndnis unter Arbeitslichtern', message: 'Ich will nicht nur eine Route abschliessen. Ich will morgen wieder zu dir kommen.' },\n+      { id: 'promise', label: 'Ein Zukunftsritual versprechen', message: 'Lass uns einen Ort haben, an dem wir uns immer wiederfinden.' },\n+      { id: 'quiet', label: 'Still neben ihm bleiben', message: 'Ich bleibe einfach hier. Keine grossen Worte, nur ich und du.' }\n+    ];\n+  }\n+  if (currentPeriod() === 'Nacht') {\n+    return [\n+      { id: 'stargaze', label: 'Sterne im Schaufelrand suchen', message: 'Die Nacht macht dich weich. Ich moechte wissen, welcher Stern deiner ist.' },\n+      { id: 'protect', label: 'Wache am Bauhof halten', message: 'Heute passe ich auf, damit du einmal ruhen kannst.' },\n+      { id: 'secret', label: 'Ein Geheimnis anvertrauen', message: 'Ich erzaehle dir etwas, das ich sonst niemandem sage.' }\n+    ];\n+  }\n+  return baseChoices;\n+}\n+\n+function renderMemories() {\n+  const memories = currentRelation().memories;\n+  dom.memories.innerHTML = '';\n+  (memories.length ? memories.slice(0, 10) : ['Noch keine Szene gespeichert. Die erste Wahl zaehlt.']).forEach((memory) => {\n+    const li = document.createElement('li');\n+    li.textContent = memory;\n+    dom.memories.appendChild(li);\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+function renderRouteCards() {\n+  document.querySelectorAll('.route-card').forEach((card) => {\n+    card.classList.toggle('active', card.dataset.id === state.current);\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+async function playChoice(choice, customMessage = '') {\n+  const relation = currentRelation();\n+  const message = customMessage || choice.message;\n+  setLoading(true);\n+  try {\n+    const response = await fetch('/api/interact', {\n+      method: 'POST',\n+      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n+      body: JSON.stringify({\n+        baggerId: state.current,\n+        action: choice.id,\n+        actionLabel: choice.label,\n+        message,\n+        day: state.day,\n+        period: currentPeriod(),\n+        location: dom.location.textContent,\n+        routePhase: routePhase(relation),\n+        bond: relation.bond,\n+        trust: relation.trust,\n+        warmth: relation.warmth,\n+        depth: relation.depth,\n+        courage: relation.courage,\n+        memories: relation.memories\n+      })\n+    });\n+    const data = await response.json();\n+    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Die Szene konnte nicht geladen werden.');\n+    applyOutcome(data, choice);\n+  } catch (error) {\n+    state.lastDialogue = `Die Funkverbindung kratzt, aber ${baggers[state.current].name} bleibt bei dir. ${error.message}`;\n+  } finally {\n+    setLoading(false);\n+    saveState();\n+    render();\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function applyOutcome(data, choice) {\n+  const relation = currentRelation();\n+  relation.bond = clamp(relation.bond + data.bondDelta);\n+  relation.trust = clamp(relation.trust + data.trustDelta);\n+  relation.warmth = clamp(relation.warmth + data.warmthDelta);\n+  relation.depth = clamp(relation.depth + data.depthDelta);\n+  relation.courage = clamp(relation.courage + (data.courageDelta || localCourageDelta(choice.id)));\n+  relation.mood = data.mood || relation.mood;\n+  if (choice.id === 'date') relation.dates += 1;\n+  remember(data.memory || `${baggers[state.current].name}: ${choice.label}`);\n+  state.lastDialogue = data.reply || `${baggers[state.current].name} antwortet mit einem warmen Motorbrummen.`;\n+  advanceTime();\n+  animateModel(data.visual || choice.id);\n+}\n+\n+function localCourageDelta(action) {\n+  return ['vulnerable', 'confession', 'secret', 'protect'].includes(action) ? 5 : 2;\n+}\n+\n+function remember(memory) {\n+  const relation = currentRelation();\n+  relation.memories.unshift(memory);\n+  relation.memories = [...new Set(relation.memories)].slice(0, 24);\n+}\n+\n+function advanceTime() {\n+  state.periodIndex += 1;\n+  if (state.periodIndex >= periods.length) {\n+    state.periodIndex = 0;\n+    state.day = Math.min(30, state.day + 1);\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function setLoading(isLoading) {\n+  document.querySelectorAll('button, textarea').forEach((control) => {\n+    control.disabled = isLoading;\n+  });\n+  if (isLoading) dom.dialogue.textContent = 'Die Szene wird geschrieben. Der Bagger hoert genau hin.';\n+}\n+\n+function initThree() {\n+  scene = new THREE.Scene();\n+  scene.fog = new THREE.Fog(0x120f16, 9, 20);\n+  camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(38, 1, 0.1, 100);\n+  camera.position.set(5.4, 3.2, 7.6);\n+  renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true });\n+  renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));\n+  dom.modelStage.appendChild(renderer.domElement);\n+\n+  const hemi = new THREE.HemisphereLight(0xfff0d0, 0x181824, 2.4);\n+  scene.add(hemi);\n+  const key = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffd28a, 3.2);\n+  key.position.set(4, 6, 5);\n+  scene.add(key);\n+  const rim = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0x84d2ff, 1.8);\n+  rim.position.set(-5, 3, -4);\n+  scene.add(rim);\n+  const floor = new THREE.Mesh(\n+    new THREE.CylinderGeometry(4.8, 4.8, .08, 72),\n+    new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x31251d, roughness: .9 })\n+  );\n+  floor.position.y = -.72;\n+  scene.add(floor);\n+  resizeRenderer();\n+  window.addEventListener('resize', resizeRenderer);\n+  tick();\n+}\n+\n+function resizeRenderer() {\n+  const rect = dom.modelStage.getBoundingClientRect();\n+  renderer.setSize(rect.width, rect.height, false);\n+  camera.aspect = rect.width / Math.max(1, rect.height);\n+  camera.updateProjectionMatrix();\n+}\n+\n+function rebuildExcavator() {\n+  if (!scene) return;\n+  if (excavator) scene.remove(excavator);\n+  excavator = createExcavator(baggers[state.current].colors);\n+  excavator.rotation.y = -0.45 + pose * 0.32;\n+  scene.add(excavator);\n+}\n+\n+function createExcavator(colors) {\n+  const group = new THREE.Group();\n+  const bodyMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: colors.body, metalness: .35, roughness: .42 });\n+  const accentMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: colors.accent, emissive: colors.accent, emissiveIntensity: .08, metalness: .2, roughness: .3 });\n+  const darkMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: colors.dark, metalness: .45, roughness: .62 });\n+  const dirtMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x6a4b2e, roughness: .95 });\n+\n+  addBox(group, [2.4, .85, 1.25], [0, .25, 0], bodyMat, .12);\n+  addBox(group, [1.05, .9, 1.05], [-.45, 1.0, 0], bodyMat, .16);\n+  addBox(group, [.72, .55, .08], [-.48, 1.08, .56], accentMat, .05);\n+  addBox(group, [.72, .55, .08], [-.48, 1.08, -.56], accentMat, .05);\n+  addBox(group, [3.0, .38, 1.42], [0, -.42, 0], darkMat, .18);\n+\n+  for (let side of [-.48, .48]) {\n+    for (let i = 0; i < 9; i += 1) {\n+      addBox(group, [.18, .48, .18], [-1.22 + i * .31, -.43, side], darkMat, .05);\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  const boom = addBox(group, [2.35, .22, .24], [1.35, 1.45, 0], bodyMat, .08);\n+  boom.rotation.z = -.42;\n+  const arm = addBox(group, [1.35, .2, .22], [2.55, .72, 0], bodyMat, .08);\n+  arm.rotation.z = -1.06;\n+  const bucket = addBox(group, [.58, .52, .82], [2.78, -.18, 0], dirtMat, .08);\n+  bucket.rotation.z = -.18;\n+  addBox(group, [.16, .16, .18], [1.25, 1.36, 0], darkMat, .05);\n+  addBox(group, [.14, .14, .16], [2.36, .92, 0], darkMat, .05);\n+\n+  const heart = new THREE.Mesh(\n+    new THREE.SphereGeometry(.12, 24, 16),\n+    new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0xff6f91, emissive: 0xff315d, emissiveIntensity: .55 })\n+  );\n+  heart.scale.set(1, .78, .42);\n+  heart.position.set(-.12, .78, .66);\n+  group.add(heart);\n+  group.userData = { boom, arm, bucket, heart };\n+  return group;\n+}\n+\n+function addBox(parent, size, position, material, radius) {\n+  const geometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(...size, 2, 2, 2);\n+  const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material);\n+  mesh.position.set(...position);\n+  mesh.castShadow = true;\n+  mesh.receiveShadow = true;\n+  parent.add(mesh);\n+  return mesh;\n+}\n+\n+function animateModel(visual) {\n+  if (!excavator) return;\n+  excavator.userData.pulseUntil = performance.now() + 1400;\n+  excavator.userData.visual = visual;\n+}\n+\n+function tick(time = 0) {\n+  animationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(tick);\n+  if (excavator) {\n+    excavator.rotation.y += .0025;\n+    excavator.position.y = Math.sin(time * .0015) * .035;\n+    const data = excavator.userData;\n+    const active = data.pulseUntil && performance.now() < data.pulseUntil;\n+    data.heart.scale.setScalar(active ? 1.25 + Math.sin(time * .018) * .2 : 1);\n+    if (data.visual === 'digging' && active) {\n+      data.boom.rotation.z = -.58 + Math.sin(time * .014) * .2;\n+      data.arm.rotation.z = -1.18 + Math.sin(time * .014) * .22;\n+      data.bucket.rotation.z = -.35 + Math.sin(time * .014) * .25;\n+    }\n+  }\n+  renderer.render(scene, camera);\n+}\n+\n+document.querySelectorAll('.route-card').forEach((card) => {\n+  card.addEventListener('click', () => {\n+    state.current = card.dataset.id;\n+    state.lastDialogue = `${baggers[state.current].name} tritt in den Vordergrund. Die Route wartet auf deine naechste Wahl.`;\n+    saveState();\n+    render();\n+  });\n+});\n+\n+dom.form.addEventListener('submit', (event) => {\n+  event.preventDefault();\n+  const message = dom.freeMessage.value.trim();\n+  if (!message) return;\n+  dom.freeMessage.value = '';\n+  playChoice({ id: 'free', label: 'Eigene Dialogwahl', message }, message);\n+});\n+\n+dom.newGame.addEventListener('click', () => {\n+  if (!window.confirm('Neues Spiel starten und lokalen Spielstand loeschen?')) return;\n+  state = defaultState();\n+  saveState();\n+  render();\n+});\n+\n+dom.poseButton.addEventListener('click', () => {\n+  pose = (pose + 1) % 4;\n+  rebuildExcavator();\n+});\n+\n+dom.dateButton.addEventListener('click', () => {\n+  playChoice({ id: 'date', label: 'Rendezvous planen', message: 'Ich plane ein Rendezvous, das zu dir passt: langsam, aufmerksam und ohne falschen Glanz.' });\n+});\n+\n+initThree();\n+render();\n+\n+window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {\n+  cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrame);\n+});\n*** End Patch"
}
