\"glass_charm\", \"star_map\"],\n+        \"disliked\": [\"loud_horn\", \"cheap_flower\"],\n+        \"critical\": \"river_stone\",\n+    },\n+}\n+\n+SCHEDULE_ACTIONS = {\n+    \"work\": {\"label\": \"Work shift\", \"currency\": 8, \"fatigue\": 12, \"stats\": {\"focus\": 1}},\n+    \"study\": {\"label\": \"Maintenance study\", \"currency\": 0, \"fatigue\": 5, \"stats\": {\"mechanics\": 4, \"focus\": 2}},\n+    \"courage\": {\"label\": \"Courage training\", \"currency\": 0, \"fatigue\": 8, \"stats\": {\"courage\": 4}},\n+    \"scrap\": {\"label\": \"Scrap collecting\", \"currency\": 2, \"fatigue\": 7, \"stats\": {\"mechanics\": 1, \"patience\": 1}, \"finds\": [\"kiesel\", \"river_stone\"]},\n+    \"rest\": {\"label\": \"Rest\", \"currency\": 0, \"fatigue\": -18, \"stats\": {\"patience\": 1}},\n+    \"charm\": {\"label\": \"Practice honest words\", \"currency\": 0, \"fatigue\": 4, \"stats\": {\"charm\": 4}},\n+    \"focus\": {\"label\": \"Quiet observation\", \"currency\": 0, \"fatigue\": 2, \"stats\": {\"focus\": 3, \"patience\": 2}},\n+}\n+\n+PLAYER_STYLES = {\n+    \"earnest\": {\"label\": \"Earnest\", \"stats\": {\"charm\": 2, \"patience\": 2}},\n+    \"shy\": {\"label\": \"Shy\", \"stats\": {\"patience\": 4, \"focus\": 1}},\n+    \"bold\": {\"label\": \"Bold\", \"stats\": {\"courage\": 4, \"charm\": 1}},\n+    \"practical\": {\"label\": \"Practical\", \"stats\": {\"mechanics\": 4, \"focus\": 1}},\n+    \"poetic\": {\"label\": \"Poetic\", \"stats\": {\"focus\": 2, \"charm\": 2, \"patience\": 1}},\n+}\n+\n+CALENDAR = [\n+    {\"id\": romance finale written in the margin of a groundwater map.\", \"riverbed\", [cond(stat=\"bond\", gte=70), cond(flag=\"route_locked_mira\")], [], {}, [\"map margin\"], player.\", \"workshop\", [cond(flag=\"mira_friend_route_open\")], [], {}, [\"shared atlas\"], [\"ending_candidate_friend_mira\"], {\"toward_friendship\": 2}),\n+        (\"mira_missed_seed\", \"daily\", \"Blank Map\", \"A missed-opportunity seed where the map has no mark where the player expected one.\", \"workshop\", [cond(routePressure=\"needs_repair\", gte=4)], [], {}, [\"blank map\"], [\"mira_missed_seed\"], {\"needs_repair\": 1}),\n+        (\"mira_secret_finale\", \"finale\", \"Spring Beneath Quarry\", \"The secret ending begins where the quarry floor starts to sing with water.\", \"quarry_edge\", [cond(flag=\"mira_secret_open\"), cond(stat=\"bond\", gte=92), cond(flag=\"route_locked_mira\")], [], {}, [\"underground spring\"], [\"ending_candidate_secret_mira\"], {\"opens_secret\": 5}),\n+    ],\n+}\n+\n+\n+def make_node(route, spec):\n+    (node_id, category, chapter, premise, location, required, blocked, stat_hints, motifs, flags, pressure) = spec\n+    return {\n+        \"id\": node_id,\n+        \"route\": route,\n+        \"category\": category,\n+        \"chapter\": chapter,\n+        \"premise\": premise,\n+        \"location\": location,\n+        \"periodAffinity\": [\"Morgen\", \"Nachmittag\", \"Abend\", \"Nacht\"],\n+        \"requiredFlags\": required,\n+        \"blockedByFlags\": blocked,\n+        \"statHints\": stat_hints,\n+        \"motifs\": motifs,\n+        \"choiceSet\": [\"sincere\", \"careful\", \"bold\"],\n+        \"nextCandidates\": [],\n+        \"routePressureEffects\": pressure,\n+        \"setsFlags\": flags,\n+        \"translationStyleNotes\": STYLE_BIBLE[\"routes\"][route],\n+    }\n+\n+\n+ROUTES = {route: [make_node(route, spec) for spec in specs] for route, specs in ROUTE_SPECS.items()}\n+\n+FLAG_REGISTRY = sorted({\n+    flag\n+    for nodes in ROUTES.values()\n+    for node in nodes\n+    for flag in node.get(\"setsFlags\", [])\n+} | {\n+    f\"route_locked_{route}\" for route in BAGGERS\n+} | {\n+    f\"broken_promise_{route}\" for route in BAGGERS\n+} | {\n+    f\"gift_{item}_{route}\" for route in BAGGERS for item in ITEMS\n+} | {\n+    f\"missed_festival_{route}\" for route in BAGGERS\n+} | {\n+    f\"missed_route_{route}\" for route in BAGGERS\n+})\n+\n+ENDINGS = {\n+    route: {\n+        \"bad\": {\"label\": \"Bad End\", \"priority\": 10},\n+        \"missed\": {\"label\": \"Missed Route End\", \"priority\": 20},\n+        \"friendship\": {\"label\": \"Friendship End\", \"priority\": 30},\n+        \"normal\": {\"label\": \"Normal Romance End\", \"priority\": 40},\n+        \"true\": {\"label\": \"True Romance End\", \"priority\": 50},\n+        \"secret\": {\"label\": \"Secret End\", \"priority\": 60},\n+    } for route in BAGGERS\n+}\n+\n+\n+def public_game_data():\n+    return {\n+        \"styleBible\": STYLE_BIBLE,\n+        \"baggers\": BAGGERS,\n+        \"locations\": LOCATIONS,\n+        \"items\": ITEMS,\n+        \"giftPreferences\": GIFT_PREFERENCES,\n+ ROUTE_PRESSURES,\n+    ROUTES,\n+    SCHEDULE_ACTIONS,\n+    STYLE_BIBLE,\n+    public_game_data,\n+)\n+\n+PERIODS = [\"Morgen\", \"Nachmittag\", \"Abend\", \"Nacht\"]\n+SAVE_DIR = Path(os.environ.get(\"BAGGER_SAVE_DIR\", \"/opt/bagger-api/data/saves\"))\n+TRACE_DIR = Path(os.environ.get(\"BAGGER_TRACE_DIR\", \"/opt/bagger-api/data/traces\"))\n+SCHEMA_VERSION = 2\n+\n+\n+def gemini_model():\n+    model = os.environ.get(\"GEMINI_TEXT_MODEL\") or os.environ.get(\"GEMINI_MODEL\") or \"gemini-2.5-flash\"\n+    if \"live\" in model:\n+        return \"gemini-2.5-flash\"\n+    return model\n+\n+\n+def clamp(value, minimum=0, maximum=100):\n+    try:\n+        number = int(value)\n+    except (TypeError, ValueError):\n+        number = 0\n+    return max(minimum, min(maximum, number))\n+\n+\n+def clean_text(value, limit=1000):\n+    return str(value or \"\").strip()[:limit]\n+\n+\n+def default_state(player=None):\n+    player = player or {\"name\": \"Pilot\", \"address\": \"du\", \"style\": \"earnest\"}\n+    stats = {\"mechanics\": 0, \"charm\": 0, \"patience\": 0, \"courage\": 0, \"focus\": 0, \"fatigue\": 0}\n+    style = PLAYER_STYLES.get(player.get(\"style\", \"earnest\"), PLAYER_STYLES[\"earnest\"])\n+    for key, value in style[\"stats\"].items():\n+        stats[key] = stats.get(key, 0) + value\n+    return {\n+        \"schemaVersion\": SCHEMA_VERSION,\n+        \"player\": player,\n+        \"day\": 1,\n+        \"periodIndex\": 0,\n+        \"currentRoute\": \"aurora\",\n+        \"lockedRoute\": None,\n+        \"relationships\": {\n+            route: {\n+                \"bond\": 0,\n+                \"trust\": 0,\n+                \"warmth\": 0,\n+                \"depth\": 0,\n+                \"courage\": 0,\n+                \"mood\": \"vorsichtig neugierig\" if route == \"aurora\" else \"wach und zugewandt\",\n+                \"memories\": [],\n+                \"dates\": 0,\n+                \"neglect\": 0,\n+            }\n+            for route in BAGGERS\n+        },\n+        \"playerStats\": stats,\n+        \"flags\": [],\n+        \"inventory\": {\"kiesel\": 1},\n+        \"currency\": 20,\n+        \"backlog\": [],\n+        \"eventsSeen\": [],\n+        \"calendarState\": {\"missed\": []},\n+        \"routePressure\": {route: {pressure: 0 for pressure in ROUTE_PRESSURES} for route in BAGGERS},\n+        \"endingState\": None,\n+        \"debugMeta\": {\"lastTraceId\": None},\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def normalize_state(state):\n+    base = default_state()\n+    if not isinstance(state, dict):\n+        return base\n+    merged = {**base, **state}\n+    merged[\"schemaVersion\"] = SCHEMA_VERSION\n+    merged[\"relationships\"] = {**base[\"relationships\"], **state.get(\"relationships\", {})}\n+    for route in BAGGERS:\n+        merged[\"relationships\"][route] = {**base[\"relationships\"][route], **merged[\"relationships\"].get(route, {})}\n+    merged[\"playerStats\"] = {**base[\"playerStats\"], **state.get(\"playerStats\", {})}\n+    merged[\"routePressure\"] = {**base[\"routePressure\"], **state.get(\"routePressure\", {})}\n+    for route in BAGGERS:\n+        merged[\"routePressure\"][route] = {**base[\"routePressure\"][route], **merged[\"routePressure\"].get(route, {})}\n+    merged[\"flags\"] = list(dict.fromkeys(state.get(\"flags\", [])))\n+    merged[\"eventsSeen\"] = list(dict.fromkeys(state.get(\"eventsSeen\", [])))\n+    merged[\"backlog\"] = state.get(\"backlog\", [])[-300:]\n+    merged[\"inventory\"] = {**base[\"inventory\"], **state.get(\"inventory\", {})}\n+    return merged\n+\n+\n+def current_period(state):\n+    return PERIODS[state.get(\"periodIndex\", 0) % len(PERIODS)]\n+\n+\n+def advance_time(state):\n+    state[\"periodIndex\"] += 1\n+    if state[\"periodIndex\"] >= len(PERIODS):\n+        state[\"periodIndex\"] = 0\n+        state[\"day\"] = min(30, state[\"day\"] + 1)\n+\n+\n+def add_backlog(state, entry):\n+    entry = {\"day\": state[\"day\"], \"period\": current_period(state), **entry}\n+    state[\"backlog\"].append(entry)\n+    state[\"backlog\"] = state[\"backlog\"][-300:]\n+\n+\n+def add_memory(state, route, memory):\n+    if not memory:\n+        return\n+    memories = state[\"relationships\"][route][\"memories\"]\n+    memories.insert(0, memory[:180])\n+    state[\"relationships\"][route][\"memories\"] = list(dict.fromkeys(memories))[:24]\n+\n+\n+def has_flag(state, flag):\n+    return flag in state.get(\"flags\", [])\n+\n+\n+def add_flag(state, flag):\n+    if flag in FLAG_REGISTRY and flag not in state[\"flags\"]:\n+        state[\"flags\"].append(flag)\n+\n+\n+def route_relation(state, route):\n+    return state[\"relationships\"][route]\n+\n+\n+def check_condition(state, route, condition):\n+    relation = route_relation(state, route)\n+    if \"stat\" in condition:\n+        return relation.get(condition[\"stat\"], 0) >= condition.get(\"gte\", 0)\n+    if \"playerStat\" in condition:\n+        return state[\"playerStats\"].get(condition[\"playerStat\"], 0) >= condition.get(\"gte\", 0)\n+    if \"flag\" in condition:\n+        return has_flag(state, condition[\"flag\"])\n+    if \"dayGte\" in condition:\n+        return state[\"day\"] >= condition[\"dayGte\"]\n+    if \"routePressure\" in condition:\n+        return state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(condition[\"routePressure\"], 0) >= condition.get(\"gte\", 0)\n+    return True\n+\n+\n+def scene_unlocked(state, node):\n+    if node[\"id\"] in state.get(\"eventsSeen\", []) and node[\"category\"] not in {\"daily\", \"date\"}:\n+        return False\n+    if any(has_flag(state, flag) for flag in node.get(\"blockedByFlags\", [])):\n+        return False\n+    return all(check_condition(state, node[\"route\"], condition) for condition in node.get(\"requiredFlags\", []))\n+\n+\n+def candidate_calendar_event(state, route):\n+    period = current_period(state)\n+    for event in CALENDAR:\n+        if event[\"id\"] in state[\"eventsSeen\"]:\n+            continue\n+        if event[\"day\"] == state[\"day\"] and event[\"period\"] == period and event.get(\"route\", route) == route:\n+            return event\n+    return None\n+\n+\n+def select_scene(state, intent):\n+    route = intent.get(\"route\") or state.get(\"currentRoute\") or \"aurora\"\n+    state[\"currentRoute\"] = route\n+    event = candidate_calendar_event(state, route)\n+    nodes = ROUTES[route]\n+    rejected = []\n+\n+    preferred_categories = []\n+    if event:\n+        preferred_categories.extend([\"threshold\", \"date\", \"crisis\", \"daily\"])\n+    if intent.get(\"type\") == \"date\":\n+        preferred_categories.append(\"date\")\n+    if intent.get(\"type\") == \"gift\":\n+        preferred_categories.extend([\"date\", \"threshold\"])\n+    if state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(\"needs_repair\", 0) >= 2:\n+        preferred_categories.append(\"repair\")\n+    if state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(\"toward_friendship\", 0) >= 3:\n+        preferred_categories.append(\"friendship\")\n+    if state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(\"opens_secret\", 0) >= 3:\n+        preferred_categories.append(\"secret\")\n+    if state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(\"toward_lockin\", 0) >= 4:\n+        preferred_categories.append(\"romance\")\n+    preferred_categories.extend([\"threshold\", \"romance\", \"daily\", \"intro\", \"friendship\"])\n+\n+    for category in preferred_categories:\n+        for node in nodes:\n+            if node[\"category\"] != category:\n+                continue\n+            if scene_unlocked(state, node):\n+                return node, event, rejected\n+            rejected.append({\"id\": node[\"id\"], \"reason\": lock_reasons(state, node)})\n+\n+    return nodes[0], event, rejected\n+\n+\n+def lock_reasons(state, node):\n+    reasons = []\n+    for flag in node.get(\"blockedByFlags\", []):\n+        if has_flag(state, flag):\n+            reasons.append(f\"blocked by {flag}\")\n+    for condition in node.get(\"requiredFlags\", []):\n+        if not check_condition(state, node[\"route\"], condition):\n+            reasons.append(f\"missing {condition}\")\n+    return reasons or [\"already seen or category mismatch\"]\n+\n+\n+def apply_schedule(state, intent):\n+    action_id = intent.get(\"scheduleAction\") or intent.get(\"id\")\n+    action = SCHEDULE_ACTIONS.get(action_id)\n+    if not action:\n+        return {}\n+    effects = {\"label\": action[\"label\"], \"stats\": {}, \"currency\": action.get(\"currency\", 0), \"items\": []}\n+    state[\"currency\"] = max(0, state.get(\"currency\", 0) + action.get(\"currency\", 0))\n+    for stat, delta in action.get(\"stats\", {}).items():\n+        state[\"playerStats\"][stat] = clamp(state[\"playerStats\"].get(stat, 0) + delta)\n+        effects[\"stats\"][stat] = delta\n+    state[\"playerStats\"][\"fatigue\"] = clamp(state[\"playerStats\"].get(\"fatigue\", 0) + action.get(\"fatigue\", 0))\n+    effects[\"fatigue\"] = action.get(\"fatigue\", 0)\n+    finds = action.get(\"finds\", [])\n+    if finds:\n+        item = finds[(state[\"day\"] + state[\"periodIndex\"]) % len(finds)]\n+        state[\"inventory\"][item] = state[\"inventory\"].get(item, 0) + 1\n+        effects[\"items\"].append(item)\n+    return effects\n+\n+\n+def apply_gift(state, route, item_id):\n+    if not item_id or state[\"inventory\"].get(item_id, 0) <= 0:\n+        return {\"fit\": \"none\", \"item\": None}\n+    state[\"inventory\"][item_id] -= 1\n+    prefs = GIFT_PREFERENCES[route]\n+    fit = \"neutral\"\n+    if item_id in prefs[\"liked\"]:\n+        fit = \"liked\"\n+    if item_id in prefs[\"disliked\"]:\n+        fit = \"disliked\"\n+    if item_id == prefs[\"critical\"]:\n+        fit = \"critical\"\n+    add_flag(state, f\"gift_{item_id}_{route}\")\n+    return {\"fit\": fit, \"item\": ITEMS[item_id], \"itemId\": item_id}\n+\n+\n+def buy_item(state, item_id):\n+    item = ITEMS.get(item_id)\n+    if not item:\n+        return {\"ok\": False, \"error\": \"unknown item\"}\n+    if state.get(\"currency\", 0) < item[\"cost\"]:\n+        return {\"ok\": False, \"error\": \"not enough currency\"}\n+    state[\"currency\"] -= item[\"cost\"]\n+    state[\"inventory\"][item_id] = state[\"inventory\"].get(item_id, 0) + 1\n+    return {\"ok\": True, \"item\": item}\n+\n+\n+def location_fit(route, location_id):\n+    location = LOCATIONS.get(location_id) or LOCATIONS[\"workshop\"]\n+    tags = set(location[\"tags\"])\n+    liked = len(tags & set(BAGGERS[route][\"preferredTags\"]))\n+    disliked = len(tags & set(BAGGERS[route][\"dislikedTags\"]))\n+    if liked >= 2 and disliked == 0:\n+        return \"good\"\n+    if disliked:\n+        return \"poor\"\n+    return \"neutral\"\n+\n+\n+def compose_prompt(state, intent, node, event, gift, schedule_effects):\n+    route = node[\"route\"]\n+    relation = route_relation(state, route)\n+    player = state[\"player\"]\n+    location = LOCATIONS.get(intent.get(\"location\") or node[\"location\"], LOCATIONS[node[\"location\"]])\n+    return f\"\"\"Du bist Szenenautor fuer eine japanisch inspirierte Visual-Novel-Dating-Sim ueber {STYLE_BIBLE['global']['target']}.\n+Regeln: {'; '.join(STYLE_BIBLE['global']['rules'])}\n+Route voice: {STYLE_BIBLE['routes'][route]['voice']}\n+Motifs: {', '.join(node['motifs'])}\n+Scene rhythm: {STYLE_BIBLE['global']['scene_rhythm']}\n+\n+Spieler: {player.get('name', 'Pilot')} ({player.get('style', 'earnest')})\n+Tag/Zeit: Tag {state['day']}/30, {current_period(state)}\n+Ort: {node['premise']}\n+Wahl/Absicht: {intent.get('label') or intent.get('type')}\n+Freitext des Spielers: {clean_text(intent.get('message'), 900) or '(keine eigene Zeile)'}\n+Geschenk: {gift.get('fit')} {gift.get('itemId') or ''}\n+Schedule effects: {json.dumps(schedule_effects, ensure_ascii=False)}\n+Beziehung: {json.dumps(relation, ensure_ascii=False)[:1200]}\n+Spielerwerte: \"courageDelta\": -5 bis 8,\n+  \"suggestedFlags\": [\"nur bekannte Flags, falls passend\"],\n+  \"routePressure\": {{\"toward_romance\": -2 bis 3, \"toward_friendship\": -2 bis 3, \"needs_repair\": \"1\":\n+        return mock_gemini(prompt)\n+    api_key = os.environ.get(\"GEMINI_API_KEY\", \"\")\n+    if not api_key:\n+        return mock_gemini(prompt)\n+    body = json.dumps({\n+        \"contents\": [{\"parts\": [{\"text\": prompt}]}],\n+        \"generationConfig\": {\n+            \"temperature\": 0.86,\n+            \"maxOutputTokens\": 1100,\n+            \"thinkingConfig\": {\"thinkingBudget\": 0},\n+            \"responseMimeType\": \"application/json\",\n+        },\n+    }).encode(\"utf-8\")\n+    request = urllib.request.Request(\n+ method=\"POST\",\n+    )\n+    with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=30) as response:\n+        data = json.loads(response.read().decode(\"utf-8\"))\n+    text = \"\".join(part.get(\"text\", \"\") for part in data.get(\"candidates\", [{}])[0].get(\"content\", {}).get(\"parts\", [])).strip()\n+    return parse_json_text(text)\n+\n+\n+def parse_json_text(text):\n+    try:\n+        return json.loads(text)\n+    except json.JSONDecodeError:\n+        match = re.search(r\"\\{.*\\}\", text, re.S)\n+        if match:\n+            return json.loads(match.group(0))\n+        raise\n+\n+\n+def mock_gemini(prompt):\n+    return {\n+        \"reply\": \"Der Motor wurde leiser, als haette die Szene ploetzlich weniger Platz fuer Ausreden. Meine Schaufel blieb ueber dem Boden stehen. Wenn du morgen wiederkommst, werde ich so tun, als haette ich nicht darauf gewartet. Aber die Lampe in meiner Kabine weiss es besser.\",\n+        \"emotionalRead\": \"sincere and attentive\",\n+        \"bondDelta\": 5,\n+        \"trustDelta\": 4,\n+        \"warmthDelta\": 4,\n+        \"depthDelta\": 3,\n+        \"courageDelta\": 2,\n+        \"suggestedFlags\": [],\n+        \"routePressure\": {\"toward_romance\": 1, \"toward_friendship\": 0, \"needs_repair\": 0, \"opens_secret\": 0, \"toward_crisis\": 0, \"toward_lockin\": 0},\n+        \"nextTone\": \"listening\",\n+        \"memory\": \"Ein ruhiger Moment wurde ernst genommen.\",\n+        \"visual\": \"listening\",\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def validate_ai(data, node):\n+    if not isinstance(data, dict):\n+        data = {}\n+    route = node[\"route\"]\n+    known_flags = set(FLAG_REGISTRY) | set(node.get(\"setsFlags\", []))\n+    return {\n+        \"reply\": clean_text(data.get(\"reply\"), 900) or mock_gemini(\"\")[\"reply\"],\n+        \"emotionalRead\": clean_text(data.get(\"emotionalRead\"), 180),\n+        \"bondDelta\": clamp(data.get(\"bondDelta\"), -8, 12),\n+        \"trustDelta\": clamp(data.get(\"trustDelta\"), -8, 12),\n+        \"warmthDelta\": clamp(data.get(\"warmthDelta\"), -8, 12),\n+        \"depthDelta\": clamp(data.get(\"depthDelta\"), -8, 12),\n+        \"courageDelta\": clamp(data.get(\"courageDelta\"), -5, 8),\n+        \"suggestedFlags\": [flag for flag in data.get(\"suggestedFlags\", []) if flag in known_flags and flag.startswith((route, \"gift_\", \"route_locked_\", \"broken_promise_\", \"missed_\"))][:5],\n+        \"routePressure\": {pressure: clamp((data.get(\"routePressure\") or {}).get(pressure, 0), -2, 3) for pressure in ROUTE_PRESSURES},\n+        \"nextTone\": data.get(\"nextTone\") if data.get(\"nextTone\") in {\"listening\", \"shy\", \"proud\", \"guarded\", \"digging\", \"crisis\", \"confession\"} else \"listening\",\n+        \"memory\": clean_text(data.get(\"memory\"), 180),\n+        \"visual\": data.get(\"visual\") if data.get(\"visual\") in {\"listening\", \"shy\", \"proud\", \"guarded\", \"digging\", \"crisis\", \"confession\"} else \"listening\",\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def apply_scene_result(state, node, event, intent, ai, gift, schedule_effects):\n+    route = node[\"route\"]\n+    relation = route_relation(state, route)\n+    fatigue_penalty = 2 if state[\"playerStats\"].get(\"fatigue\", 0) > 75 else 0\n+    for key, delta_key in [(\"bond\", \"bondDelta\"), (\"trust\", \"trustDelta\"), (\"warmth\", \"warmthDelta\"), (\"depth\", \"depthDelta\"), (\"courage\", \"courageDelta\")]:\n+        relation[key] = clamp(relation.get(key, 0) + ai[delta_key] - (fatigue_penalty if key in {\"bond\", \"warmth\"} else 0))\n+    relation[\"mood\"] = ai.get(\"nextTone\") or relation.get(\"mood\")\n+    if intent.get(\"type\") == \"date\":\n+        relation[\"dates\"] += 1\n+    if gift.get(\"fit\") == \"critical\":\n+        relation[\"bond\"] = clamp(relation[\"bond\"] + 4)\n+        state[\"routePressure\"][route][\"opens_secret\"] += 1\n+    elif gift.get(\"fit\") == \"liked\":\n+        relation[\"warmth\"] = clamp(relation[\"warmth\"] + 2)\n+    elif gift.get(\"fit\") == \"disliked\":\n+        relation[\"trust\"] = clamp(relation[\"trust\"] - 2)\n+        state[\"routePressure\"][route][\"needs_repair\"] += 1\n+    for flag in node.get(\"setsFlags\", []):\n+        add_flag(state, flag)\n+    for flag in ai.get(\"suggestedFlags\", []):\n+        add_flag(state, flag)\n+    for pressure, delta in node.get(\"routePressureEffects\", {}).items():\n+        state[\"routePressure\"][route][pressure] = clamp(state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(pressure, 0) + delta, -10, 99)\n+    for pressure, delta in ai.get(\"routePressure\", {}).items():\n+        state[\"routePressure\"][route][pressure] = clamp(state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(pressure, 0) + delta, -10, 99)\n+    if state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(\"toward_lockin\", 0) >= 5 and not state.get(\"lockedRoute\"):\n+        add_flag(state, f\"route_locked_{route}\")\n+        state[\"lockedRoute\"] = route\n+    if node[\"id\"] not in state[\"eventsSeen\"]:\n+        state[\"eventsSeen\"].append(node[\"id\"])\n+    if event and event[\"id\"] not in state[\"eventsSeen\"]:\n+        state[\"eventsSeen\"].append(event[\"id\"])\n+    memory = ai.get(\"memory\") or f\"Tag {state['day']}, {current_period(state)}: {BAGGERS[route]['name']} erinnert sich an {node['chapter']}.\"\n+    add_memory(state, route, memory)\n+    add_backlog(state, {\"type\": \"player\", \"speaker\": state[\"player\"].get(\"name\", \"Pilot\"), \"text\": clean_text(intent.get(\"message\") or intent.get(\"label\") or intent.get(\"type\"), 600), \"route\": route, \"location\": node[\"location\"], \"choiceId\": intent.get(\"id\")})\n+    add_backlog(state, {\"type\": \"dialogue\", \"speaker\": BAGGERS[route][\"name\"], \"text\": ai[\"reply\"], \"route\": route, \"location\": node[\"location\"], \"choiceId\": node[\"id\"]})\n+    ending = resolve_ending(state, route)\n+    if ending:\n+        state[\"endingState\"] = ending\n+    else:\n+        advance_time(state)\n+    return {\"memory\": memory, \"ending\": ending}\n+\n+\n+def resolve_ending(state, route):\n+    relation = route_relation(state, route)\n+    flags = set(state.get(\"flags\", []))\n+    if state[\"day\"] < 30 and not any(flag.startswith(\"ending_candidate_\") for flag in flags):\n+        return None\n+    if f\"ending_candidate_secret_{route}\" in flags and relation[\"bond\"] >= 92:\n+        kind = \"secret\"\n+    elif f\"ending_candidate_true_{route}\" in flags and relation[\"bond\"] >= 88 and relation[\"trust\"] >= 55 and relation[\"depth\"] >= 55:\n+        kind = \"true\"\n+    elif f\"ending_candidate_normal_{route}\" in flags and relation[\"bond\"] >= 70:\n+        kind = \"normal\"\n+    elif f\"ending_candidate_friend_{route}\" in flags or state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(\"toward_friendship\", 0) >= 7:\n+        kind = \"friendship\"\n+    elif relation.get(\"neglect\", 0) >= 4 or state[\"routePressure\"][route].get(\"needs_repair\", 0) >= 7:\n+        kind = \"bad\"\n+    elif state[\"day\"] >= 30:\n+        kind = \"missed\"\n+    else:\n+        return None\n+    return {\"route\": route, \"kind\": kind, \"label\": ENDINGS[route][kind][\"label\"], \"resolvedAt\": int(time.time())}\n+\n+\n+def resolve_interaction(payload):\n+    state = normalize_state(payload.get(\"state\") or payload)\n+    intent = payload.get(\"intent\") or {\n+        \"type\": payload.get(\"action\") or \"free\",\n+        \"id\": payload.get(\"action\") or \"free\",\n+        \"message\": payload.get(\"message\", \"\"),\n+        \"route\": payload.get(\"baggerId\") or state.get(\"currentRoute\", \"aurora\"),\n+    }\n+    route = intent.get(\"route\") or state.get(\"currentRoute\") or \"aurora\"\n+    if route not in BAGGERS:\n+        route = \"aurora\"\n+    state[\"currentRoute\"] = route\n+    if state.get(\"endingState\"):\n+        return {\"state\": state, \"reply\": \"Diese Route hat bereits ihr Ende erreicht.\", \"scene\": None}\n+    if intent.get(\"type\") == \"buy\":\n+        buy = buy_item(state, intent.get(\"itemId\"))\n+        return {\"state\": state, \"buy\": buy, \"reply\": buy.get(\"error\") or \"Item gekauft.\", \"scene\": None}\n+    schedule_effects = apply_schedule(state, intent) if intent.get(\"type\") == \"schedule\" else {}\n+    gift = apply_gift(state, route, intent.get(\"itemId\")) if intent.get(\"type\") == \"gift\" else {\"fit\": \"none\", \"item\": None}\n+    node, event, rejected = select_scene(state, intent)\n+    prompt = compose_prompt(state, intent, node, event, gift, schedule_effects)\n+    trace_id = secrets.token_hex(8)\n+    try:\n+        ai = validate_ai(call_gemini(prompt), node)\n+    except (urllib.error.HTTPError, urllib.error.URLError, TimeoutError, json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError) as error:\n+        ai = validate_ai(mock_gemini(prompt), node)\n+        ai[\"emotionalRead\"] = f\"fallback after {type(error).__name__}\"\n+    outcome = apply_scene_result(state, node, event, intent, ai, gift, schedule_effects)\n+    trace = {\n+        \"traceId\": trace_id,\n+        \"selectedScene\": node[\"id\"],\n+        \"rejectedScenes\": rejected[:20],\n+        \"event\": event,\n+        \"intent\": {k: v for k, v in intent.items() if k != \"state\"},\n+        \"gift\": gift,\n+        \"scheduleEffects\": schedule_effects,\n+        \"ai\": {k: v for k, v in ai.items() if k != \"reply\"},\n+        \"outcome\": outcome,\n+    }\n+    state[\"debugMeta\"][\"lastTraceId\"] = trace_id\n+    write_trace(trace)\n+    return {\n+        \"state\": state,\n+        \"scene\": node,\n+        \"calendarEvent\": event,\n+        \"reply\": ai[\"reply\"],\n+        \"emotionalRead\": ai[\"emotionalRead\"],\n+        \"deltas\": {k: ai[k] for k in [\"bondDelta\", \"trustDelta\", \"warmthDelta\", \"depthDelta\", \"courageDelta\"]},\n+        \"routePressure\": ai[\"routePressure\"],\n+        \"memory\": outcome[\"memory\"],\n+        \"visual\": ai[\"visual\"],\n+        \"ending\": outcome[\"ending\"],\n+        \"traceId\": trace_id,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def write_trace(trace):\n+    try:\n+        TRACE_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+        path = TRACE_DIR / f\"{trace['traceId']}.json\"\n+        path.write_text(json.dumps(trace, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    except OSError:\n+        pass\n+\n+\n+def save_state(state, token=None):\n+    SAVE_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    token = token or secrets.token_urlsafe(18)\n+    state = normalize_state(state)\n+    body = json.dumps({\"schemaVersion\": SCHEMA_VERSION, \"state\": state}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)\n+    if len(body.encode(\"utf-8\")) > 600_000:\n+        raise ValueError(\"save too large\")\n+    tmp = SAVE_DIR / f\"{token}.tmp\"\n+    final = SAVE_DIR / f\"{token}.json\"\n+    tmp.write_text(body, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    tmp.replace(final)\n+    return token\n+\n+\n+def load_save(token):\n+    if not re.fullmatch(r\"[A-Za-z0-9_\\-]{16,80}\", token or \"\"):\n+        raise FileNotFoundError(\"invalid token\")\n+    path = SAVE_DIR / f\"{token}.json\"\n+    data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n+    return normalize_state(data.get(\"state\"))\n+\n+\n+def validate_routes():\n+    errors = []\n+    for route, nodes in ROUTES.items():\n+        if len(nodes) < 20:\n+            errors.append(f\"{route}: fewer than 20 nodes\")\n+        seen = set()\n+        for node in nodes:\n+            if node[\"id\"] in seen:\n+                errors.append(f\"{route}: duplicate node {node['id']}\")\n+            seen.add(node[\"id\"])\n+            if node[\"location\"] not in LOCATIONS:\n+                errors.append(f\"{node['id']}: unknown location {node['location']}\")\n+            if not node.get(\"motifs\"):\n+                errors.append(f\"{node['id']}: missing motifs\")\n+            for flag in node.get(\"setsFlags\", []):\n+                if flag not in FLAG_REGISTRY:\n+                    errors.append(f\"{node['id']}: unknown set flag {flag}\")\n+    return errors\n+\n+\n+def simulate(route=\"aurora\", strategy=\"romance\", steps=80):\n+    state = default_state({\"name\": \"Sim\", \"address\": \"du\", \"style\": \"earnest\"})\n+    state[\"currentRoute\"] = route\n+    os.environ[\"BAGGER_MOCK_GEMINI\"] = \"1\"\n+    intents = {\n+        \"romance\": [{\"type\": \"free\", \"id\": \"sincere\", \"label\": \"sincere\", \"message\": \"Ich bleibe vorsichtig bei dir.\", \"route\": route}],\n+        \"friendship\": [{\"type\": \"free\", \"id\": \"careful\", \"label\": \"friendship\", \"message\": \"Ich will dein Freund sein, ohne dich zu draengen.\", \"route\": route}],\n+        \"balanced\": [{\"type\": \"schedule\", \"id\": \"study\", \"scheduleAction\": \"study\", \"route\": route}, {\"type\": \"free\", \"id\": \"sincere\", \"message\": \"Ich hoere zu.\", \"route\": route}],\n+        \"neglect\": [{\"type\": \"schedule\", \"id\": \"work\", \"scheduleAction\": \"work\", \"route\": route}],\n+        \"gift-heavy\": [{\"type\": \"schedule\", \"id\": \"scrap\", \"scheduleAction\": \"scrap\", \"route\": route}, {\"type\": \"gift\", \"id\": \"gift\", \"itemId\": \"kiesel\", \"message\": \"Ich habe etwas Kleines mitgebracht.\", \"route\": route}],\n+        \"training-heavy\": [{\"type\": \"schedule\", \"id\": \"study\", \"scheduleAction\": \"study\", \"route\": route}, {\"type\": \"schedule\", \"id\": \"courage\", \"scheduleAction\": \"courage\", \"route\": route}],\n+    }.get(strategy, [])\n+    history = []\n+    for i in range(steps):\n+        if state.get(\"endingState\"):\n+            break\n+        intent = intents[i % len(intents)]\n+        result = resolve_interaction({\"state\": state, \"intent\": intent})\n+        state = result[\"state\"]\n+        history.append({\"step\": i, \"scene\": (result.get(\"scene\") or {}).get(\"id\"), \"ending\": result.get(\"ending\")})\n+    return {\"state\": state, \"history\": history, \"ending\": state.get(\"endingState\")}\n+\n+\n+def game_data():\n+    return public_game_data()\n*** End Patch"
}

I need to make sure to replace app.py and create a careful path for `/api/save/:token`. I also have to work on the environment file and check if I need to set up CORS for this. Plus, I need to ensure the import path is correct.

{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Delete File: /opt/bagger-api/app.py\n*** Add File: /opt/bagger-api/app.py\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, ThreadingHTTPServer\n+from urllib.parse import urlparse\n+import json\n+import os\n+import sys\n+import urllib.error\n+\n+sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))\n+\n+from game_engine import (  # noqa: E402\n+    default_state,\n+    game_data,\n+    gemini_model,\n+    load_save,\n+    resolve_ending,\n+    resolve_interaction,\n+    save_state,\n+    simulate,\n+    validate_routes,\n+)\n+\n+ENV_FILE = \"/opt/conversation-sip/.env\"\n+PORT = int(os.environ.get(\"BAGGER_API_PORT\", \"8103\"))\n+\n+\n+def load_env_file(path):\n+    if not os.path.exists(path):\n+        return\n+    with open(path, \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as env_file:\n+        for line in env_file:\n+            line = line.strip()\n+            if not line or line.startswith(\"#\") or \"=\" not in line:\n+                continue\n+            key, value = line.split(\"=\", 1)\n+            os.environ.setdefault(key.strip(), value.strip().strip('\"').strip(\"'\"))\n+\n+\n+load_env_file(ENV_FILE)\n+\n+\n+class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):\n+    def _send_json(self, status, payload):\n+        body = json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False).encode(\"utf-8\")\n+        self.send_response(status)\n+        self.send_header(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json; charset=utf-8\")\n+        self.send_header(\"Content-Length\", str(len(body)))\n+        self.end_headers()\n+        self.wfile.write(body)\n+\n+    def _read_json(self, limit=700000):\n+        length = min(int(self.headers.get(\"Content-Length\", \"0\")), limit)\n+        if length <= 0:\n+            return {}\n+        return json.loads(self.rfile.read(length).decode(\"utf-8\"))\n+\n+    def _debug_enabled(self):\n+        return os.environ.get(\"BAGGER_DEBUG\") == \"1\" and self.client_address[0] in {\"127.0.0.1\", \"::1\"}\n+\n+    def do_GET(self):\n+        parsed = urlparse(self.path)\n+        path = parsed.path\n+        try:\n+            if path == \"/api/health\":\n+                self._send_json(200, {\"ok\": True, \"model\": gemini_model(), \"routeErrors\": validate_routes()})\n+                return\n+            if path == \"/api/game-data\":\n+                self._send_json(200, game_data())\n+                return\n+            if path.startswith(\"/api/save/\"):\n+                token = path.rsplit(\"/\", 1)[-1]\n+                self._send_json(200, {\"ok\": True, \"token\": token, \"state\": load_save(token)})\n+                return\n+            if path.startswith(\"/api/debug/\"):\n+                if not self._debug_enabled():\n+                    self._send_json(404, {\"error\": \"Not found\"})\n+                    return\n+                if path == \"/api/debug/routes\":\n+                    self._send_json(200, {\"errors\": validate_routes(), \"data\": game_data()[\"routes\"]})\n+                    return\n+            self._send_json(404, {\"error\": \"Not found\"})\n+        except FileNotFoundError:\n+            self._send_json(404, {\"error\": \"Save not found\"})\n+        except Exception as error:\n+            self._send_json(500, {\"error\": str(error)})\n+\n+    def do_POST(self):\n+        parsed = urlparse(self.path)\n+        path = parsed.path\n+        try:\n+            payload = self._read_json()\n+            if path == \"/api/interact\":\n+                self._send_json(200, resolve_interaction(payload))\n+                return\n+            if path == \"/api/new-game\":\n+                self._send_json(200, {\"ok\": True, \"state\": default_state(payload.get(\"player\"))})\n+                return\n+            if path == \"/api/save\":\n+                token = save_state(payload.get(\"state\") or {}, payload.get(\"token\"))\n+                self._send_json(200, {\"ok\": True, \"token\": token})\n+                return\n+            if path == \"/api/restore\":\n+                token = str(payload.get(\"token\", \"\"))\n+                self._send_json(200, {\"ok\": True, \"token\": token, \"state\": load_save(token)})\n+                return\n+            if path.startswith(\"/api/debug/\"):\n+                if not self._debug_enabled():\n+                    self._send_json(404, {\"error\": \"Not found\"})\n+                    return\n+                if path == \"/api/debug/simulate\":\n+                    self._send_json(200, simulate(payload.get(\"route\", \"aurora\"), payload.get(\"strategy\", \"romance\"), int(payload.get(\"steps\", 80))))\n+                    return\n+                if path == \"/api/debug/resolve-ending\":\n+                    state = payload.get(\"state\") or {}\n+                    route = payload.get(\"route\", state.get(\"currentRoute\", \"aurora\"))\n+                    self._send_json(200, {\"ending\": resolve_ending(state, route)})\n+                    return\n+            self._send_json(404, {\"error\": \"Not found\"})\n+        except urllib.error.HTTPError as error:\n+            detail = error.read().decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")[:500]\n+            self._send_json(502, {\"error\": \"AI service rejected the request\", \"detail\": detail})\n+        except FileNotFoundError:\n+            self._send_json(404, {\"error\": \"Save not found\"})\n+        except ValueError as error:\n+            self._send_json(400, {\"error\": str(error)})\n+        except Exception as error:\n+            self._send_json(500, {\"error\": str(error)})\n+\n+    def log_message(self, format, *args):\n+        print(format % args, flush=True)\n+\n+\n+if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n+    server = ThreadingHTTPServer((\"127.0.0.1\", PORT), Handler)\n+    print(f\"Bagger Dating Sim API listening on http://127.0.0.1:{PORT}\", flush=True)\n+    server.serve_forever()\n*** End Patch"
}

{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: /opt/bagger-api/tools/simulate.py\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+import argparse\n+import json\n+import os\n+import sys\n+\n+ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(__file__))\n+sys.path.insert(0, ROOT)\n+os.environ.setdefault(\"BAGGER_MOCK_GEMINI\", \"1\")\n+\n+from game_data import ROUTES, public_game_data  # noqa: E402\n+from game_engine import default_state, load_save, resolve_ending, select_scene, simulate, validate_routes  # noqa: E402\n+\n+\n+def print_json(value):\n+    print(json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n+\n+\n+def list_routes(_args):\n+    print_json({route: len(nodes) for route, nodes in ROUTES.items()})\n+\n+\n+def show_route(args):\n+    print_json(ROUTES.get(args.route, []))\n+\n+\n+def validate(_args):\n+    errors = validate_routes()\n+    print_json({\"ok\": not errors, \"errors\": errors})\n+    return 1 if errors else 0\n+\n+\n+def run_simulation(args):\n+    print_json(simulate(args.route, args.strategy, args.steps))\n+\n+\n+def ending_fixture(args):\n+    state = default_state({\"name\": \"Fixture\", \"style\": \"earnest\", \"address\": \"du\"})\n+    route = args.fixture.split(\"_\", 1)[-1] if \"_\" in args.fixture else args.route\n+    kind = args.fixture.split(\"_\", 1)[0]\n+    state[\"currentRoute\"] = route\n+    state[\"lockedRoute\"] = route\n+    state[\"day\"] = 30\n+    state[\"periodIndex\"] = 3\n+    state[\"relationships\"][route].update({\"bond\": 95, \"trust\": 80, \"warmth\": 80, \"depth\": 80, \"courage\": 60})\n+    state[\"flags\"].append(f\"route_locked_{route}\")\n+    if kind in {\"normal\", \"true\", \"secret\", \"friend\"}:\n+        state[\"flags\"].append(f\"ending_candidate_{'friend' if kind == 'friend' else kind}_{route}\")\n+    print_json({\"fixture\": args.fixture, \"ending\": resolve_ending(state, route), \"state\": state})\n+\n+\n+def explain_scene(args):\n+    state = load_save(args.save) if args.save else default_state()\n+    if args.route:\n+        state[\"currentRoute\"] = args.route\n+    node, event, rejected = select_scene(state, {\"type\": args.intent, \"route\": state[\"currentRoute\"]})\n+    print_json({\"selected\": node, \"calendarEvent\": event, \"rejected\": rejected[:50]})\n+\n+\n+def dump_data(_args):\n+    print_json(public_game_data())\n+\n+\n+def main():\n+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Bagger Hearts route simulation and debug CLI\")\n+    sub = parser.add_subparsers(dest=\"command\", required=True)\n+\n+    sub.add_parser(\"list-routes\").set_defaults(func=list_routes)\n+    show = sub.add_parser(\"show-route\")\n+    show.add_argument(\"route\")\n+    show.set_defaults(func=show_route)\n+    sub.add_parser(\"validate-routes\").set_defaults(func=validate)\n+    data = sub.add_parser(\"dump-data\")\n+    data.set_defaults(func=dump_data)\n+\n+    sim = sub.add_parser(\"simulate\")\n+    sim.add_argument(\"--route\", default=\"aurora\")\n+    sim.add_argument(\"--strategy\", default=\"romance\", choices=[\"romance\", \"friendship\", \"balanced\", \"neglect\", \"gift-heavy\", \"training-heavy\"])\n+    sim.add_argument(\"--steps\", type=int, default=80)\n+    sim.set_defaults(func=run_simulation)\n+\n+    fixture = sub.add_parser(\"ending-fixture\")\n+    fixture.add_argument(\"fixture\")\n+    fixture.add_argument(\"--route\", default=\"aurora\")\n+    fixture.set_defaults(func=ending_fixture)\n+\n+    explain = sub.add_parser(\"explain-scene\")\n+    explain.add_argument(\"--save\", default=\"\")\n+    explain.add_argument(\"--route\", default=\"\")\n+    explain.add_argument(\"--intent\", default=\"free\")\n+    explain.set_defaults(func=explain_scene)\n+\n+    args = parser.parse_args()\n+    result = args.func(args)\n+    raise SystemExit(result or 0)\n+\n+\n+if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n+    main()\n*** End Patch"

<meta charset=\"utf-8\">\n+  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\">\n+  <title>Bagger Hearts: Hydraulik Rendezvous</title>\n+  <meta name=\"description\" content=\"Eine Gemini-gestuetzte Bagger-Dating-Sim mit 3D-Baggern, Routen, Kalender, Gifts, Endings und echten Erinnerungen.\">\n+  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"styles.css\">\n+</head>\n+<body>\n+  <main class=\"app-shell\">\n+    <section id=\"setup\" class=\"setup-card hidden\" aria-labelledby=\"setup-title\">\n+      <p class=\"eyebrow\">New Game</p>\n+      <h1 id=\"setup-title\">Wer betritt den Bauhof?</h1>\n+      <form id=\"setup-form\" class=\"setup-form\">\n+        <label>Name <input id=\"player-name\" maxlength=\"32\" placeholder=\"Pilot\"></label>\n+        <label>Anrede <input id=\"player-address\" maxlength=\"32\" placeholder=\"du\"></label>\n+        <label>Persoenlichkeit\n+          <select id=\"player-style\"></select>\n+        </label>\n+        <button type=\"submit\">Route beginnen</button>\n+      </form>\n+      <form id=\"restore-form\" class=\"setup-form compact\">\n+        <label>Save Token wiederherstellen <input id=\"restore-token\" maxlength=\"90\" placeholder=\"Token einfuegen\"></label>\n+        <button type=\"submit\">Wiederherstellen</button>\n+      </form>\n+    </section>\n+\n+    <section id=\"game\" class=\"hidden\">\n+      <section class=\"title-card\" aria-labelledby=\"game-title\">\n+        <div>\n+          <p class=\"eyebrow\">Gulasch Visual Novel System</p>\n+          <h1 id=\"game-title\">Bagger Hearts</h1>\n+          <p class=\"subtitle\">Hydraulik Rendezvous</p>\n+        </div>\n+        <div class=\"calendar-panel\" aria-live=\"polite\">\n+          <span>Tag <strong id=\"day\">1</strong> / 30</span>\n+          <span id=\"period\">Morgen</span>\n+          <span id=\"lock-state\">Keine Route gelockt</span>\n+          <button id=\"new-game\" class=\"game-stage\">\n+        <div class=\"viewport-card\">\n+          <div class=\"scene-meta\">\n+            <span id=\"location\">Bauhof bei Sonnenaufgang</span>\n+            <span id=\"route-phase\">Prolog</span>\n+          </div>\n+          <div id=\"model-stage\" class=\"model-stage\" aria-label=\"3D Modell des aktuellen Baggers\"></div>\n+          <div class=\"model-tools\">\n+            <button id=\"pose-button\" type=\"button\">Pose wechseln</button>\n+            <button id=\"backlog-button\" type=\"button\">Backlog</button>\n+            <button id=\"save-button\" type=\"button\">Server speichern</button>\n+          </div>\n+        </div>\n+\n+        <aside class=\"status-panel\" aria-label=\"Beziehungsstatus\">\n+          <h2 id=\"bagger-name\">Aurora 7000</h2>\n+          <p id=\"bagger-story\"></p>\n+          <div class=\"heart-meter\">\n+            <span>Herzklopfen</span>\n+            <strong id=\"bond-value\">0%</strong>\n+            <div class=\"meter\"><i id=\"bond-meter\"></i></div>\n+            <p id=\"bond-title\">Fremde Maschinenherzen</p>\n+          </div>\n+          <div class=\"stats-grid relationship-stats\">\n+            <span>Vertrauen <strong id=\"trust\">0</strong></span>\n+            <span>Waerme <strong id=\"warmth\">0</strong></span>\n+            <span>Tiefe <strong id=\"depth\">0</strong></span>\n+            <span>Mut <strong id=\"courage\">0</strong></span>\n+          </div>\n+          <h3>Protagonist</h3>\n+          <div id=\"player-stats\" class=\"stats-grid\"></div>\n+          <div class=\"wallet\">Budget: <strong id=\"currency\">0</strong> Schraubmarken</div>\n+        </aside>\n+      </section>\n+\n+      <section class=\"systems-grid\">\n+        <section class=\"system-card\">\n+          <h2>Scheduling</h2>\n+          <div id=\"schedule-actions\" class=\"button-grid\"></div>\n+        </section>\n+        <section class=\"system-card\">\n+          <h2>Date planen</h2>\n+          <label>Ort <select id=\"date-location\"></select></label>\n+          <button id=\"date-button\" type=\"button\">Rendezvous starten</button>\n+        </section>\n+        <section class=\"system-card\">\n+          <h2>Geschenke & Shop</h2>\n+          <label>Item <select id=\"gift-item\"></select></label>\n+          <div class=\"split-actions\">\n+            <button id=\"gift-button\" type=\"button\">Schenken</button>\n+            <button id=\"buy-button\" type=\"button\">Kaufen</button>\n+          </div>\n+          <ul id=\"inventory\" class=\"mini-list\"></ul>\n+        </section>\n+      </section>\n+\n+      <section class=\"novel-box\" aria-label=\"Dialog\">\n+        <div class=\"speaker-row\">\n+          <strong id=\"speaker\">Aurora 7000</strong>\n+          <span id=\"mood\">Vorsichtig neugierig</span>\n+        </div>\n+        <p id=\"dialogue\">Der Bauhof ist still. Drei besondere Bagger warten darauf, dass du nicht nur klickst, sondern wirklich bleibst.</p>\n+        <div id=\"ending-card\" class=\"ending-card hidden\"></div>\n+        <div id=\"choices\" class=\"choices\"></div>\n+        <form id=\"talk-form\" class=\"talk-form\">\n+          <label for=\"free-message\">Eigene Zeile sprechen</label>\n+          <textarea id=\"free-message\" maxlength=\"900\" rows=\"3\" placeholder=\"Schreibe etwas Persoenliches, eine Frage, ein Versprechen oder einen Zweifel.\"></textarea>\n+          <button type=\"submit\">Als eigene Dialogwahl senden</button>\n+        </form>\n+      </section>\n+\n+      <section class=\"memory-board\" aria-labelledby=\"memory-title\">\n+        <div>\n+          <h2 id=\"memory-title\">Fahrtenbuch</h2>\n+          <p>Wichtige gemeinsame Momente veraendern spaetere Antworten und Enden.</p>\n+          <p id=\"save-token-label\" class=\"token-label\"></p>\n+        </div>\n+        <ul id=\"memories\"></ul>\n+      </section>\n+    </section>\n+  </main>\n+\n+  <dialog id=\"backlog-dialog\" class=\"backlog-dialog\">\n+    <form method=\"dialog\"><button class=\"close-button\">Schliessen</button></form>\n+    <h2>Backlog</h2>\n+    <label>Route filtern <select id=\"backlog-filter\"><option value=\"all\">Alle</option></select></label>\n+    <div id=\"backlog-list\" class=\"backlog-list\"></div>\n+  </dialog>\n+\n+  <script type=\"module\" src=\"script.js\"></script>\n+</body>\n+</html>\n*** End Patch"
}

{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Delete File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/styles.css\n*** Add File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/styles.css\n+:root {\n+  color-scheme: dark;\n+  --bg: #0d0b12;\n+  --panel: rgba(22, 18, 27, .88);\n+  --panel-strong: rgba(34, 27, 39, .96);\n+  --line: rgba(255, 239, 209, .15);\n+  --text: #fff4df;\n+  --muted: #cdbb9c;\n+  --gold: #ffbf46;\n+  --rose: #ff6f91;\n+  --blue: #84d2ff;\n+  --green: #91e6a7;\n+  --danger: #ff8a70;\n+  --shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, .4);\n+}\n+\n+* { box-sizing: border-box; }\n+body { margin: 0; min-height: 100vh; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", sans-serif; background: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 10%, rgba(255, 111, 145, .18), transparent 24rem), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 6%, rgba(132, 210, 255, .16), transparent 26rem), linear-gradient(145deg, #0d0b12 0%, #1a1313 54%, #09080b 100%); color: var(--text); }\n+button, textarea, input, select { font: inherit; }\n+button, select { cursor: pointer; }\n+button:disabled, textarea:disabled, select:disabled { cursor: wait; opacity: .6; }\n+input, textarea, select { border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px 14px; background: rgba(0,0,0,.26); color: var(--text); }\n+label { display: grid; gap: 7px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 800; }\n+h1, h2, h3, p { margin-top: 0; }\n+.hidden { display: none !important; }\n+\n+.app-shell { width: min(1380px, calc(100% - 28px)); margin: 0 auto; padding: 28px 0 42px; }\n+.title-card, .route-card, .viewport-card, .status-panel, .novel-box, .memory-board, .system-card, .setup-card, .backlog-dialog { border: 1px solid var(--line); background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--panel), rgba(14, 12, 18, .82)); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px var(--shadow); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); }\n+.setup-card { width: min(760px, 100%); margin: 8vh auto; padding: clamp(28px, 6vw, 56px); border-radius: 34px; }\n+.setup-form { display: grid; gap: 14px; margin-top: 22px; }\n+.setup-form.compact { margin-top: 28px; padding-top: 22px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line); }\n+.setup-form button, .calendar-panel button, .model-tools button, .talk-form button, .choices button, .button-grid button, .system-card button, .close-button { border: 0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 13px 16px; background: var(--gold); color: #160f08; font-weight: 950; }\n+\n+.title-card { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 22px; align-items: end; padding: clamp(26px, 5vw, 52px); border-radius: 34px; }\n+.eyebrow { margin: 0 0 10px; color: var(--gold); font-size: .76rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase; }\n+h1 { margin-bottom: 0; font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 9vw, 8rem); line-height: .78; letter-spacing: -.08em; }\n+.subtitle { margin: 8px 0 0; color: var(--rose); font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 3vw, 2rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; }\n+.calendar-panel { display: grid; gap: 10px; min-width: 245px; padding: 18px; border-radius: 22px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .07); }\n+.calendar-panel span { color: var(--muted); }\n+.calendar-panel strong { color: var(--text); font-size: 1.6rem; }\n+#lock-state { color: var(--blue); }\n+\n+.route-select { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 14px; margin: 16px 0; }\n+.route-card { min-height: 148px; padding: 20px; border-radius: 26px; color: var(--text); text-align: left; transition: transform .2s ease, border-color .2s ease, background .2s ease; }\n+.route-card:hover, .route-card.active { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: rgba(255, 191, 70, .72); background: rgba(255, 191, 70, .1); }\n+.route-card.locked-out { opacity: .62; }\n+.route-kana { float: right; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .22); font-size: 3.2rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; }\n+.route-card strong { display: block; margin-top: 20px; font-size: 1.45rem; }\n+.route-card small { display: block; margin-top: 8px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.45; }\n+\n+.game-stage { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 380px; gap: 16px; }\n+.viewport-card, .status-panel { border-radius: 30px; }\n+.viewport-card { min-height: 560px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }\n+.scene-meta { position: absolute; z-index: 2; left: 18px; right: 18px; top: 18px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; }\n+.scene-meta span { padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .35); color: var(--muted); font-size: .9rem; }\n+.model-stage { width: 100%; height: 520px; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 80%, rgba(255, 191, 70, .14), transparent 26rem); }\n+.model-stage canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }\n+.model-tools { position: absolute; left: 18px; right: 18px; bottom: 18px; display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }\n+.model-tools button { background: rgba(255, 244, 223, .9); }\n+\n+.status-panel { padding: 24px; }\n+.status-panel h2 { margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.4rem); line-height: .92; letter-spacing: -.05em; }\n+.status-panel p { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.55; }\n+.status-panel h3 { margin: 18px 0 10px; color: var(--gold); }\n+.heart-meter { margin: 20px 0; padding: 18px; border-radius: 22px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .065); }\n+.heart-meter span, .wallet { color: var(--muted); }\n+.heart-meter strong { display: block; margin: 6px 0 12px; font-size: 2.8rem; }\n+.meter { height: 12px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .12); }\n+.meter i { display: block; width: 0%; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), var(--rose), var(--blue)); transition: width .35s ease; }\n+#bond-title { margin: 12px 0 0; }\n+.stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 10px; }\n+.stats-grid span { padding: 12px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .065); color: var(--muted); }\n+.stats-grid strong { display: block; margin-top: 4px; color: var(--text); font-size: 1.25rem; }\n+.wallet { margin-top: 14px; padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .065); }\n+\n+.systems-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr .9fr .9fr; gap: 16px; margin-top: 16px; }\n+.system-card { padding: 20px; border-radius: 26px; }\n+.system-card h2 { margin-bottom: 12px; }\n+.button-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 10px; }\n+.button-grid button { min-height: 58px; text-align: left; background: rgba(255, 191, 70, .9); }\n+.system-card .split-actions { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; margin-top: 10px; }\n+.mini-list { display: grid; gap: 7px; margin: 12px 0 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; color: var(--muted); }\n+.mini-list li { padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.06); }\n+\n+.novel-box { margin-top: 16px; padding: clamp(20px, 3vw, 30px); border-radius: 30px; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(18, 18, 30, .96), rgba(33, 24, 31, .92)); }\n+.speaker-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }\n+.speaker-row strong { color: var(--gold); font-size: 1.35rem; }\n+.speaker-row span { color: var(--muted); text-align: right; }\n+#dialogue { min-height: 96px; margin-bottom: 18px; color: #fff8ea; font-size: clamp(1.12rem, 2vw, 1.35rem); line-height: 1.65; }\n+.ending-card { margin-bottom: 16px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 191, 70, .35); border-radius: 18px; background: rgba(255, 191, 70, .09); color: var(--gold); font-weight: 900; }\n+.choices { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 10px; }\n+.choices button { min-height: 72px; background: rgba(255, 191, 70, .92); text-align: left; }\n+.choices button:nth-child(2) { background: rgba(255, 111, 145, .92); color: #210710; }\n+.choices button:nth-child(3) { background: rgba(132, 210, 255, .92); color: #06131b; }\n+.talk-form { display: grid; gap: 10px; margin-top: 16px; }\n+.talk-form textarea { width: 100%; resize: vertical; line-height: 1.45; }\n+\n+.memory-board { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 310px 1fr; gap: 18px; margin-top: 16px; padding: 24px; border-radius: 30px; }\n+.memory-board h2 { margin-bottom: 8px; }\n+.memory-board p { margin-bottom: 0; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }\n+.memory-board ul { display: grid; gap: 8px; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; }\n+.memory-board li { padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 15px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, .065); color: var(--muted); }\n+.token-label { margin-top: 12px !important; word-break: break-all; color: var(--blue) !important; }\n+\n+.backlog-dialog { width: min(860px, calc(100% - 24px)); max-height: 82vh; border-radius: 26px; color: var(--text); padding: 24px; }\n+.backlog-dialog::backdrop { background: rgba(0,0,0,.72); }\n+.close-button { float: right; }\n+.backlog-list { display: grid; gap: 10px; margin-top: 16px; max-height: 55vh; overflow: auto; }\n+.backlog-entry { padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 15px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.07); }\n+.backlog-entry small { display: block; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 5px; }\n+\n+@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; } }\n+@media (max-width: 1050px) { .title-card, .game-stage, .memory-board, .systems-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .title-card { display: grid; } .route-select, .choices { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .calendar-panel { min-width: 0; } }\n+@media (max-width: 620px) { .app-shell { width: min(100% - 18px, 560px); padding-top: 10px; } .title-card, .viewport-card, .status-panel, .novel-box, .memory-board, .system-card { border-radius: 22px; } .model-stage { height: 380px; } .viewport-card { min-height: 430px; } .scene-meta { position: static; padding: 14px 14px 0; display: grid; } .model-tools { position: static; padding: 0 14px 14px; } .stats-grid, .button-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }\n*** End Patch"

  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Delete File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/script.js\n*** Add File: /var/www/bagger.gulasch.site/script.js\n+import * as THREE from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.165.0/build/three.module.js';\n+\n+const periods = ['Morgen', 'Nachmittag', 'Abend', 'Nacht'];\n+const kana = { aurora: '\u6708', brummbert: '\u525b', mira: '\u8a69' };\n+const stateKey = 'baggerDatingSim.v2';\n+const tokenKey = 'baggerDatingSim.saveToken';\n+\n+let data;\n+let state;\n+let lastReply = 'Der Bauhof ist still. Drei besondere Bagger warten darauf, dass du nicht nur klickst, sondern wirklich bleibst.';\n+let lastScene;\n+let renderer;\n+let scene;\n+let camera;\n+let excavator;\n+let pose = 0;\n+let animationFrame;\n+\n+const dom = {\n+  setup: document.querySelector('#setup'),\n+  game: document.querySelector('#game'),\n+  setupForm: document.querySelector('#setup-form'),\n+  restoreForm: document.querySelector('#restore-form'),\n+  playerName: document.querySelector('#player-name'),\n+  playerAddress: document.querySelector('#player-address'),\n+  playerStyle: document.querySelector('#player-style'),\n+  restoreToken: [REDACTED]('#restore-token'),\n+  routeSelect: document.querySelector('#route-select'),\n+  day: document.querySelector('#day'),\n+  period: document.querySelector('#period'),\n+  lockState: document.querySelector('#lock-state'),\n+  location: document.querySelector('#location'),\n+  phase: document.querySelector('#route-phase'),\n+  modelStage: document.querySelector('#model-stage'),\n+  name: document.querySelector('#bagger-name'),\n+  story: document.querySelector('#bagger-story'),\n+  bondValue: document.querySelector('#bond-value'),\n+  bondMeter: document.querySelector('#bond-meter'),\n+  bondTitle: document.querySelector('#bond-title'),\n+  trust: document.querySelector('#trust'),\n+  warmth: document.querySelector('#warmth'),\n+  depth: document.querySelector('#depth'),\n+  courage: document.querySelector('#courage'),\n+  playerStats: document.querySelector('#player-stats'),\n+  currency: document.querySelector('#currency'),\n+  scheduleActions: document.querySelector('#schedule-actions'),\n+  dateLocation: document.querySelector('#date-location'),\n+  dateButton: document.querySelector('#date-button'),\n+  giftItem: document.querySelector('#gift-item'),\n+  giftButton: document.querySelector('#gift-button'),\n+  buyButton: document.querySelector('#buy-button'),\n+  inventory: document.querySelector('#inventory'),\n+  speaker: document.querySelector('#speaker'),\n+  mood: document.querySelector('#mood'),\n+  dialogue: document.querySelector('#dialogue'),\n+  choices: document.querySelector('#choices'),\n+  form: document.querySelector('#talk-form'),\n+  freeMessage: document.querySelector('#free-message'),\n+  endingCard: document.querySelector('#ending-card'),\n+  memories: document.querySelector('#memories'),\n+  saveTokenLabel: document.querySelector('#save-token-label'),\n+  newGame: document.querySelector('#new-game'),\n+  poseButton: document.querySelector('#pose-button'),\n+  saveButton: document.querySelector('#save-button'),\n+  backlogButton: document.querySelector('#backlog-button'),\n+  backlogDialog: document.querySelector('#backlog-dialog'),\n+  backlogFilter: document.querySelector('#backlog-filter'),\n+  backlogList: document.querySelector('#backlog-list')\n+};\n+\n+async function api(path, payload) {\n+  const options = payload === undefined ? {} : {\n+    method: 'POST',\n+    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n+    body: JSON.stringify(payload)\n+  };\n+  const response = await fetch(path, options);\n+  const json = await response.json();\n+  if (!response.ok) throw new Error(json.error || `API error ${response.status}`);\n+  return json;\n+}\n+\n+async function init() {\n+  data = await api('/api/game-data');\n+  populateSetup();\n+  const saved = localStorage.getItem(stateKey);\n+  if (saved) {\n+    state = JSON.parse(saved);\n+    showGame();\n+  } else {\n+    dom.setup.classList.remove('hidden');\n+  }\n+  initThreeSafe();\n+  bindEvents();\n+}\n+\n+function populateSetup() {\n+  dom.playerStyle.innerHTML = Object.entries(data.playerStyles).map(([id, style]) => `<option value=\"${id}\">${style.label}</option>`).join('');\n+  dom.backlogFilter.innerHTML = '<option value=\"all\">Alle</option>' + Object.entries(data.baggers).map(([id, bagger]) => `<option value=\"${id}\">${bagger.name}</option>`).join('');\n+}\n+\n+function showGame() {\n+  dom.setup.classList.add('hidden');\n+  dom.game.classList.remove('hidden');\n+  render();\n+}\n+\n+function saveLocal() {\n+  localStorage.setItem(stateKey, JSON.stringify(state));\n+}\n+\n+function token() {\n+  return localStorage.getItem(tokenKey) || '';\n+}\n+\n+function currentRoute() {\n+  return state.currentRoute || 'aurora';\n+}\n+\n+function currentBagger() {\n+  return data.baggers[currentRoute()];\n+}\n+\n+function relation(route = currentRoute()) {\n+  return state.relationships[route];\n+}\n+\n+function period() {\n+  return periods[state.periodIndex % periods.length];\n+}\n+\n+function bondTitle(bond) {\n+  if (state.endingState) return state.endingState.label;\n+  if (bond >= 92) return 'Geheime Hydraulikliebe';\n+  if (bond >= 70) return 'Kurz vor dem Gest\u00e4ndnis';\n+  if (bond >= 45) return 'Sp\u00fcrbare Zuneigung';\n+  if (bond >= 20) return 'Funken im Motorraum';\n+  return 'Fremde Maschinenherzen';\n+}\n+\n+function routePhase() {\n+  const rel = relation();\n+  if (state.endingState) return `${state.endingState.label}`;\n+  if (state.lockedRoute === currentRoute()) return 'Locked Route';\n+  if (rel.bond >= 70) return 'Finale naht';\n+  if (rel.bond >= 45) return 'Vertraute Route';\n+  if (rel.bond >= 20) return 'Gemeinsame Funken';\n+  return 'Prolog';\n+}\n+\n+function render() {\n+  if (!state || !data) return;\n+  const bagger = currentBagger();\n+  const rel = relation();\n+  dom.day.textContent = state.day;\n+  dom.period.textContent = period();\n+  dom.lockState.textContent = state.lockedRoute ? `Route gelockt: ${data.baggers[state.lockedRoute].name}` : 'Keine Route gelockt';\n+  dom.location.textContent = lastScene ? locationName(lastScene.location) : 'Bauhof bei Sonnenaufgang';\n+  dom.phase.textContent = `${bagger.routeWord} \u00b7 ${routePhase()}`;\n+  dom.name.textContent = bagger.name;\n+  dom.story.textContent = bagger.story;\n+  dom.bondValue.textContent = `${rel.bond}%`;\n+  dom.bondMeter.style.width = `${rel.bond}%`;\n+  dom.bondTitle.textContent = bondTitle(rel.bond);\n+  dom.trust.textContent = rel.trust;\n+  dom.warmth.textContent = rel.warmth;\n+  dom.depth.textContent = rel.depth;\n+  dom.courage.textContent = rel.courage;\n+  dom.currency.textContent = state.currency;\n+  dom.speaker.textContent = bagger.name;\n+  dom.mood.textContent = rel.mood || 'wach und zugewandt';\n+  dom.dialogue.textContent = lastReply;\n+  renderRouteCards();\n+  renderPlayerStats();\n+  renderSystems();\n+  renderChoices();\n+  renderInventory();\n+  renderMemories();\n+  renderEnding();\n+  renderSaveToken();\n+  rebuildExcavator();\n+}\n+\n+function locationName(id) {\n+  return data.locations[id]?.name || id || 'Bauhof';\n+}\n+\n+function renderRouteCards() {\n+  dom.routeSelect.innerHTML = '';\n+  Object.entries(data.baggers).forEach(([id, bagger]) => {\n+    const card = document.createElement('button');\n+    card.type = 'button';\n+    card.className = `route-card ${id === currentRoute() ? 'active' : ''} ${state.lockedRoute && state.lockedRoute !== id ? 'locked-out' : ''}`;\n+    card.dataset.id = id;\n+    card.innerHTML = `<span class=\"route-kana\">${kana[id]}</span><strong>${bagger.name}</strong><small>${bagger.routeWord}: ${bagger.story}</small>`;\n+    card.addEventListener('click', () => {\n+      state.currentRoute = id;\n+      lastReply = `${bagger.name} tritt in den Vordergrund. Die Route wartet auf deine naechste Wahl.`;\n+      saveLocal();\n+      render();\n+    });\n+    dom.routeSelect.appendChild(card);\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+function renderPlayerStats() {\n+  dom.playerStats.innerHTML = Object.entries(state.playerStats).map(([key, value]) => `<span>${label(key)} <strong>${value}</strong></span>`).join('');\n+}\n+\n+function renderSystems() {\n+  dom.scheduleActions.innerHTML = Object.entries(data.scheduleActions).map(([id, action]) => `<button type=\"button\" data-schedule=\"${id}\">${action.label}<br><small>${describeSchedule(action)}</small></button>`).join('');\n+  dom.scheduleActions.querySelectorAll('[data-schedule]').forEach((button) => button.addEventListener('click', () => interact({ type: 'schedule', id: button.dataset.schedule, scheduleAction: button.dataset.schedule, label: data.scheduleActions[button.dataset.schedule].label })));\n+  dom.dateLocation.innerHTML = Object.entries(data.locations).filter(([, location]) => location.unlockDay <= state.day).map(([id, location]) => `<option value=\"${id}\">${location.name}</option>`).join('');\n+  dom.giftItem.innerHTML = Object.entries(data.items).map(([id, item]) => `<option value=\"${id}\">${item.name} (${item.cost})</option>`).join('');\n+}\n+\n+function describeSchedule(action) {\n+  const stats = Object.entries(action.stats || {}).map(([k, v]) => `${label(k)} +${v}`).join(', ');\n+  const money = action.currency ? `, +${action.currency} Geld` : '';\n+  const fatigue = action.fatigue ? `, Fatigue ${action.fatigue > 0 ? '+' : ''}${action.fatigue}` : '';\n+  return `${stats || 'ruhige Wirkung'}${money}${fatigue}`;\n+}\n+\n+function renderChoices() {\n+  const choices = [\n+    { id: 'sincere', label: 'Aufrichtig antworten', message: 'Ich will diesen Moment nicht groesser machen als er ist. Ich will nur ehrlich bei dir bleiben.' },\n+    { id: 'careful', label: 'Vorsichtig Raum lassen', message: 'Ich draenge dich nicht. Wenn du willst, bleibe ich in deiner Naehe und sage erstmal nichts.' },\n+    { id: 'bold', label: 'Mutig einen Schritt machen', message: 'Ich habe Angst, es falsch zu sagen. Aber ich moechte, dass du weisst: Ich waehle dich heute bewusst.' }\n+  ];\n+  dom.choices.innerHTML = choices.map((choice) => `<button type=\"button\" data-choice=\"${choice.id}\">${choice.label}</button>`).join('');\n+  dom.choices.querySelectorAll('[data-choice]').forEach((button) => {\n+    const choice = choices.find((item) => item.id === button.dataset.choice);\n+    button.addEventListener('click', () => interact({ type: 'choice', id: choice.id, label: choice.label, message: choice.message }));\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+function renderInventory() {\n+  const entries = Object.entries(state.inventory).filter(([, count]) => count > 0);\n+  dom.inventory.innerHTML = entries.length ? entries.map(([id, count]) => `<li>${data.items[id]?.name || id}: ${count}</li>`).join('') : '<li>Inventar leer</li>';\n+}\n+\n+function renderMemories() {\n+  const memories = relation().memories || [];\n+  dom.memories.innerHTML = (memories.length ? memories : ['Noch keine Szene gespeichert. Die erste Wahl zaehlt.']).slice(0, 10).map((memory) => `<li>${escapeHtml(memory)}</li>`).join('');\n+}\n+\n+function renderEnding() {\n+  if (!state.endingState) {\n+    dom.endingCard.classList.add('hidden');\n+    dom.endingCard.textContent = '';\n+    return;\n+  }\n+  dom.endingCard.classList.remove('hidden');\n+  dom.endingCard.textContent = `${state.endingState.label}: ${data.baggers[state.endingState.route].name}`;\n+}\n+\n+function renderSaveToken() {\n+  dom.saveTokenLabel.textContent = token() ? `Save Token: ${token()}` : 'Noch kein Server-Save Token.';\n+}\n+\n+function label(key) {\n+  return ({ mechanics: 'Mechanik', charm: 'Charme', patience: 'Geduld', courage: 'Mut', focus: 'Fokus', fatigue: 'Fatigue', bond: 'Bindung', trust: 'Vertrauen', warmth: 'Waerme', depth: 'Tiefe' })[key] || key;\n+}\n+\n+async function interact(intent) {\n+  if (state.endingState && intent.type !== 'buy') return;\n+  setLoading(true);\n+  try {\n+    const result = await api('/api/interact', { state, intent: { route: currentRoute(), location: dom.dateLocation.value, ...intent } });\n+    state = result.state;\n+    lastReply = result.reply || lastReply;\n+    lastScene = result.scene || lastScene;\n+    if (result.ending) lastReply += `\\n\\n${result.ending.label}`;\n+    saveLocal();\n+    if (token()) await saveServer(false);\n+    animateModel(result.visual || 'listening');\n+  } catch (error) {\n+    lastReply = `Die Funkverbindung kratzt. ${error.message}`;\n+  } finally {\n+    setLoading(false);\n+    render();\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function setLoading(isLoading) {\n+  document.querySelectorAll('button, textarea, input, select').forEach((control) => {\n+    if (control.closest('#setup')) return;\n+    control.disabled = isLoading;\n+  });\n+  if (isLoading) dom.dialogue.textContent = 'Die Szene wird geschrieben. Der Bagger hoert genau hin.';\n+}\n+\n+async function saveServer(showMessage = true) {\n+  const result = await api('/api/save', { state, token: token() || undefined });\n+  localStorage.setItem(tokenKey, result.token);\n+  if (showMessage) lastReply = `Server-Save angelegt. Token: ${result.token}`;\n+  renderSaveToken();\n+}\n+\n+function renderBacklog() {\n+  const filter = dom.backlogFilter.value;\n+  const entries = (state.backlog || []).filter((entry) => filter === 'all' || entry.route === filter).slice().reverse();\n+  dom.backlogList.innerHTML = entries.map((entry) => `<div class=\"backlog-entry\"><small>Tag ${entry.day}, ${entry.period} \u00b7 ${data.baggers[entry.route]?.name || entry.route} \u00b7 ${entry.speaker}</small>${escapeHtml(entry.text)}</div>`).join('') || '<p>Backlog leer.</p>';\n+}\n+\n+function escapeHtml(text) {\n+  return String(text).replace(/[&<>\"]/g, (char) => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '\"': '&quot;' })[char]);\n+}\n+\n+function bindEvents() {\n+  dom.setupForm.addEventListener('submit', async (event) => {\n+    event.preventDefault();\n+    const player = { name: dom.playerName.value.trim() || 'Pilot', address: dom.playerAddress.value.trim() || 'du', style: dom.playerStyle.value };\n+    const result = await api('/api/new-game', { player });\n+    state = result.state;\n+    localStorage.removeItem(tokenKey);\n+    saveLocal();\n+    showGame();\n+  });\n+  dom.restoreForm.addEventListener('submit', async (event) => {\n+    event.preventDefault();\n+    const result = await api('/api/restore', { token: [REDACTED]() });\n+    state = result.state;\n+    localStorage.setItem(tokenKey, result.token);\n+    saveLocal();\n+    showGame();\n+  });\n+  dom.form.addEventListener('submit', (event) => {\n+    event.preventDefault();\n+    const message = dom.freeMessage.value.trim();\n+    if (!message) return;\n+    dom.freeMessage.value = '';\n+    interact({ type: 'free', id: 'free', label: 'Eigene Dialogwahl', message });\n+  });\n+  dom.dateButton.addEventListener('click', () => interact({ type: 'date', id: 'date', label: `Date: ${locationName(dom.dateLocation.value)}`, location: dom.dateLocation.value, message: `Ich moechte mit dir nach ${locationName(dom.dateLocation.value)} gehen.` }));\n+  dom.giftButton.addEventListener('click', () => interact({ type: 'gift', id: 'gift', label: `Geschenk: ${data.items[dom.giftItem.value].name}`, itemId: dom.giftItem.value, message: `Ich habe ${data.items[dom.giftItem.value].name} fuer dich mitgebracht.` }));\n+  dom.buyButton.addEventListener('click', () => interact({ type: 'buy', id: 'buy', itemId: dom.giftItem.value }));\n+  dom.saveButton.addEventListener('click', async () => { await saveServer(true); saveLocal(); render(); });\n+  dom.newGame.addEventListener('click', () => {\n+    if (!window.confirm('Neues Spiel starten und lokalen Spielstand loeschen?')) return;\n+    localStorage.removeItem(stateKey);\n+    localStorage.removeItem(tokenKey);\n+    window.location.reload();\n+  });\n+  dom.backlogButton.addEventListener('click', () => { renderBacklog(); dom.backlogDialog.showModal(); });\n+  dom.backlogFilter.addEventListener('change', renderBacklog);\n+  dom.poseButton.addEventListener('click', () => { pose = (pose + 1) % 4; rebuildExcavator(); });\n+}\n+\n+function initThreeSafe() {\n+  try { initThree(); } catch (error) {\n+    dom.modelStage.textContent = '3D-Modell konnte auf diesem Geraet nicht gestartet werden. Die Dating-Sim bleibt spielbar.';\n+    dom.modelStage.style.display = 'grid';\n+    dom.modelStage.style.placeItems = 'center';\n+    dom.modelStage.style.padding = '24px';\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function initThree() {\n+  scene = new THREE.Scene();\n+  scene.fog = new THREE.Fog(0x120f16, 9, 20);\n+  camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(38, 1, 0.1, 100);\n+  camera.position.set(5.4, 3.2, 7.6);\n+  camera.lookAt(0, .25, 0);\n+  renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true });\n+  renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));\n+  renderer.setClearColor(0x000000, 0);\n+  dom.modelStage.appendChild(renderer.domElement);\n+  scene.add(new THREE.HemisphereLight(0xfff0d0, 0x181824, 2.4));\n+  const key = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffd28a, 3.2);\n+  key.position.set(4, 6, 5);\n+  scene.add(key);\n+  const rim = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0x84d2ff, 1.8);\n+  rim.position.set(-5, 3, -4);\n+  scene.add(rim);\n+  const floor = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.CylinderGeometry(4.8, 4.8, .08, 72), new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x31251d, roughness: .9 }));\n+  floor.position.y = -.72;\n+  scene.add(floor);\n+  resizeRenderer();\n+  window.addEventListener('resize', resizeRenderer);\n+  tick();\n+}\n+\n+function resizeRenderer() {\n+  if (!renderer) return;\n+  const rect = dom.modelStage.getBoundingClientRect();\n+  renderer.setSize(rect.width, rect.height, false);\n+  camera.aspect = rect.width / Math.max(1, rect.height);\n+  camera.updateProjectionMatrix();\n+}\n+\n+function rebuildExcavator() {\n+  if (!scene || !data || !state) return;\n+  if (excavator) scene.remove(excavator);\n+  excavator = createExcavator(currentBagger().colors);\n+  excavator.rotation.y = -0.45 + pose * 0.32;\n+  scene.add(excavator);\n+}\n+\n+function createExcavator(colors) {\n+  const group = new THREE.Group();\n+  const bodyMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: colors.body, metalness: .35, roughness: .42 });\n+  const accentMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: colors.accent, emissive: colors.accent, emissiveIntensity: .08, metalness: .2, roughness: .3 });\n+  const darkMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: colors.dark, metalness: .45, roughness: .62 });\n+  const dirtMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x6a4b2e, roughness: .95 });\n+  addBox(group, [2.4, .85, 1.25], [0, .25, 0], bodyMat);\n+  addBox(group, [1.05, .9, 1.05], [-.45, 1.0, 0], bodyMat);\n+  addBox(group, [.72, .55, .08], [-.48, 1.08, .56], accentMat);\n+  addBox(group, [.72, .55, .08], [-.48, 1.08, -.56], accentMat);\n+  addBox(group, [3.0, .38, 1.42], [0, -.42, 0], darkMat);\n+  for (let side of [-.48, .48]) for (let i = 0; i < 9; i += 1) addBox(group, [.18, .48, .18], [-1.22 + i * .31, -.43, side], darkMat);\n+  const boom = addBox(group, [2.35, .22, .24], [1.35, 1.45, 0], bodyMat); boom.rotation.z = -.42;\n+  const arm = addBox(group, [1.35, .2, .22], [2.55, .72, 0], bodyMat); arm.rotation.z = -1.06;\n+  const bucket = addBox(group, [.58, .52, .82], [2.78, -.18, 0], dirtMat); bucket.rotation.z = -.18;\n+  const heart = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(.12, 24, 16), new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0xff6f91, emissive: 0xff315d, emissiveIntensity: .55 }));\n+  heart.scale.set(1, .78, .42); heart.position.set(-.12, .78, .66); group.add(heart);\n+  group.userData = { boom, arm, bucket, heart, visual: 'listening' };\n+  return group;\n+}\n+\n+function addBox(parent, size, position, material) {\n+  const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(...size, 2, 2, 2), material);\n+  mesh.position.set(...position);\n+  parent.add(mesh);\n+  return mesh;\n+}\n+\n+function animateModel(visual) {\n+  if (!excavator) return;\n+  excavator.userData.pulseUntil = performance.now() + 1500;\n+  excavator.userData.visual = visual;\n+}\n+\n+function tick(time = 0) {\n+  animationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(tick);\n+  if (excavator) {\n+    excavator.rotation.y += .0025;\n+    excavator.position.y = Math.sin(time * .0015) * .035;\n+    const active = excavator.userData.pulseUntil && performance.now() < excavator.userData.pulseUntil;\n+    excavator.userData.heart.scale.setScalar(active ? 1.2 + Math.sin(time * .018) * .18 : 1);\n+    if (active && ['digging', 'confession', 'crisis'].includes(excavator.userData.visual)) {\n+      excavator.userData.boom.rotation.z = -.58 + Math.sin(time * .014) * .2;\n+      excavator.userData.arm.rotation.z = -1.18 + Math.sin(time * .014) * .22;\n+      excavator.userData.bucket.rotation.z = -.35 + Math.sin(time * .014) * .25;\n+    }\n+  }\n+  renderer?.render(scene, camera);\n+}\n+\n+init().catch((error) => {\n+  document.body.innerHTML = `<main class=\"setup-card\"><h1>Bagger Hearts konnte nicht starten</h1><p>${escapeHtml(error.message)}</p></main>`;\n+});\n+\n+window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrame));\n*** End Patch"
}

gpt-5.5 | agent=build | finish=tool-calls
▶ Reasoning
**Examining schedule impacts**

I'm considering adding a relation neglect increment if the intent behind the schedule relates to work rather than visiting a route. However, if the schedule still reflects a scene, it might cause failure pressure. I could implement a system that increases neglect when the schedule involves work actions. Maybe I should apply scene results before calculating deltas. Even though Gemini mock increases bonds, neglect shouldn’t indicate failure. For schedule types, I think smaller deltas or even no relation gains might be more practical.
Die ersten Simulationen zeigen, dass die Route-Engine funktioniert, aber zu oft auf Intro-Fallbacks zurückfällt und Schedule-Aktionen zu romantisch belohnt. Ich härte jetzt Fallback-, Neglect- und Finale-Auswahl nach, damit die Systeme wirklich Dating-Sim-Druck erzeugen.
